college_info.intro:
Siliguri Institute of Technology popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech students are taught various skills in Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and various other fields. The BTech curriculum is updated from time to time to match the industry standards. The college has a well-maintained lab system for BTech students. The Department of Computer Science & Engineering in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Machine Learning (ML) has 6 laboratories for students.
Siliguri Institute of Technology's MBA students have worked as interns in top companies such as IDBI Bank, Virtual Interactive Solutions Pvt Ltd, India Post Payment Bank, and others. There is a student club for MBA students. The college arranges various events for Management students such as Case Study competitions for Management students, Intra-college departmental club debate, and others. Below mentioned are some of the popular programmes offered by Siliguri Institute of Technology, their respective eligibility and Siliguri Institute of Technology fee structure:

placements.overview: According to the latest report, the highest and average package offered during Siliguri Institute of Technology placement 2023 stood at INR 51 LPA and INR 5.20 LPA, respectively. Further, the participating recruiters offered over 220 placements to various courses of the batch 2023 so far. The top recruiters of Siliguri Institute of Technology in 2023 included Microsoft, Accenture, LG, Cognizant, Amazon, Dell, HCL, EY, Infosys, etc. The key highlights of Siliguri Institute of Technology placements for the Class of 2023 are tabulated below:

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college circumstances are very good.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% were placed in our college, our college placement percentage is decent. The highest package offered is 51 LPA, and the lowest package offered is 3 LPA. TCS, Microsoft, and Amazon are the recruiting companies of our college. An internship is available in our college.
review_content.Infrastructure: College Wi-Fi are very strong, labs are very good, classrooms are clean, the library is very peaceful, and there are many books. The mess canteen is really good and clean. There were medical facilities, and many kinds of sports are available in our college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Average faculty members, good placements in 2024, average infrastructure, and disgusting canteen.

review_content.Placements: The highest package is 52 LPA by Microsoft. It is an off campus placement. TCS hires students almost every year with an average package of 6 LPA, I suppose. Top recruiting companies include Microsoft, Google, Amazon, Wipro, Cognizant, Infosys, Capgemini, and HCL Technologies. Overall placement is 80% guaranteed. Best role offered is data analyst.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has decent Wi-Fi. Classrooms don't have air-conditioning system. Few of the labs have air conditioning but they don't work. Library books are old and outdated, and not in accordance with the latest syllabus. Even the library does not have air conditioning. Canteen is very unclean, and unhealthy foods are served. Speaking of medical services, they don't have any medicine on standby for emergencies. Sports and games consist mostly of indoor games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good placement in 2024, really good campus, and good faculty.

review_content.Placements: In the year 2024, a 92 % placement record was seen with an average CTC of 6 LPA and a median of 5 LPA. 51 LPA was the highest CTC acquired that year and the highest ever by Microsoft ( off campus ). 24 LPA was the highest CTC acquired on campus. For 25 years, SIT has been providing jobs to students, and they have done it really well.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college provides us with a lush green campus and excellent infrastructure. Air conditioning is provided in all the labs with all the equipment in fine condition. The college has one central library and a digital library. Wi-Fi is available all over campus. Cheap and good quality food is found in the canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied and placements are average.

review_content.Placements: 20 percent of students from the course is taken in placements and from there around 60 to 70 percent students are placed, the average package of this course in our college was around 8lpa, and the minimum was around 2 to 3lpa, and the highest package someone got was 51lpa, Top recruiters in our college include Capgemini, TCS, Infosys, Virtusa, and Wipro, with Microsoft, Bosch, Amazon, and etc. Companies, around 70 per cent of students get internships from the college, some get in ICL, TCS, Wipro, etc., top roles are senior software engineer, Data scientist.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: The college is really good, and if you grind, you will achieve.

review_content.Placements: I am very happy pursuing my course, and 90% of students are placed in my college. Many packages are offered by the college, like the highest package I heard about is 51 LPA, and the lowest I think is 3 LPA. The top recruiters are TCS. About 70 to 80% are eligible for internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure and course are very good, like the Wi-Fi and the labs, which are very good. The classrooms and library are very clean, and the medical facilities are one of the good things in our college. There is a wide ground for sports and games, and there are various games in our college. They also provide a gym.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Application (BCA) - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Good learning environment with supportive faculty members and decent campus facilities.

review_content.Placements: In the BCA course, around 20-40% of students got placed. Highest package offered was about 8 LPA, lowest around 3 LPA, and average stood near 1.8 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Pentonix, Fleapo, and Navarro. Most students also received internships in similar companies, and the main roles offered were Software Engineer, Developer, and related IT profiles.
review_content.Infrastructure: BCA department at SIT has good facilities like Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library with digital resources. Hostels are decent for first-year students with basic amenities, though many shift to PGs later. Mess and canteen provide hygienic food, medical facilities are available on campus, and students can enjoy both indoor and outdoor sports.

admission_overview.college_name: Siliguri Institute of Technology Admission 2025 (Open): Courses, Fees, Eligibility & Selection Criteria

admission_overview.title: SIT Siliguri Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: SIT Siliguri admission 2025 is both merit and entrance-based. The institute offers various courses at the UG and PG levels along with multiple specialisations. These include- BTech, BBA, BCA, MBA, MTech, etc. The institute also offers Diploma courses to candidates. SIT Siliguri is affiliated with Maulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology (MAKAUT), WBSCT, VE, and SD. It accepts national or state-level entrance exams such as MAT, JEMAT, WBJEE, etc., for admission. The mode of application for all the courses at SIT Siliguri is online.

eligibility_selection.title: SIT Siliguri Eligibility and Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Siliguri Institute of Technology admission 2025 is both merit and entrance-based. The selection is based on entrance exam scores for some courses, such as BTech, MBA, and MCA etc. For the rest of the courses, merit in the last qualifying exam is considered for admission. The institute might conduct a PI round for a few courses. Check below the SIT Siliguri courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria: Class 12 in the relevant stream with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category)

admission_process.title: SIT Siliguri Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SIT Siliguriadmissions 2025are entrance and merit-based. Candidates have to qualify for all the rounds of the selection process to take admission in the institute. Find below the detailed process aroundSIT Siliguri admissions 2025:
Step 1: SIT Siliguri Application Process 2025

The SIT Siliguri application process is conducted in online as well as offline modes. Candidates have to apply through the counseling bodies' websites of respective courses by using basic details such as personal and educational qualifications. Along with that, they have to pay an application fee for the respective course.
Step 2: SIT Siliguri Selection Rounds 2025

After filling out the application form, candidates have to appear for the respective entrance exam for the SIT Siliguri course admissions. The shortlisted candidates have to appear for further counseling rounds for the respective courses. The institute might conduct PI round for a few courses.
Step 3: SIT Siliguri Final Admission

After the completion of all the selection rounds, shortlisted candidates as per the merit lists will get admission to the respective courses. Students who get their names on the merit list are then requested to visit the institute for reporting, upload documents, and pay theSIT Siliguri feeto confirm their seats.

faqs.question: Can I pursue MBA from SIT Siliguri after graduation?
faqs.answer: Admission to MBA course is based on MAT/ JEMAT score followed by a counselling round. Aspirants must meet the eligibility requirements to avoid rejection during the scrutiny of the applications. Candidates who have completed graduation in any discipline can apply for the MBA course. After the completion of the selection rounds, one need to proof their eligibility with the supporting documents during the counselling process. After completion of the counselling, aspirants need to confirm their adm

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Siliguri Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: For some coursesat Siliguri Institute of Technology (SIT), direct admission is anoption. For instance, direct admission is available for the BHM (Bachelor of Hotel Management) programme, which is based on the results of the MAKAUT CET (Common Entrance Test). Furthermore, for the academic year 2022–2023, SIT has scheduled internal common entrance exams for direct admission in a number of streams.However, admission to the majority of B.Tech programmes is determined by the results of entrance tests such as WBJEE or JEE Main.

faqs.question: What entrance exams are accepted by Siliguri Institute of Technology for admission to MBA?
faqs.answer: A number of national level management entrance exams are accepted by Siliguri Institute of Technology for admission to its MBA programme. Applicants must have passed exams like theCAT, MAT, XAT, or CMATwith a valid result. In addition, the institute takes WBJEMAT scores into consideration for state-level admission.These tests assess a candidate's ability in subjects related to business management education. In order to prepare for these tests, prospective candidates should confirm that they match the qualifying requirements.

faqs.question: Is there any entrance exam required for admission to BBA at SIT Siliguri?
faqs.answer: No, admission to BBA course is based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Candidates must meet the eligibility requirements to avoid rejection during the scrutiny of the applications. After the completion of the selection rounds, candidates need to proof their eligibility with supporting documents during the counselling process. After completion of the counselling, aspirants need to confirm their admission by paying the course fee.

hostel_campus.college_name: Siliguri Institute of Technology Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The College has three hostels for 1st year students.Out of 3, 2 hostels for boys & 1 hostel for the girls. Seat capacity of the hostels is very limited, so the students can stay at hostels first cum first serve basis.

library.description: The college has well-equipped library with all modern facilities.At present it has more than fifty five thousand volumes.Book Bank facility is also available in the library.The Digital Library Archives has been started by the central library by using Greenstone Digital Library Software.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis

library.description: The college has well-equipped library with all modern facilities.At present it has more than fifty five thousand volumes.Book Bank facility is also available in the library.The Digital Library Archives has been started by the central library by using Greenstone Digital Library Software.

hostel.description: The College has three hostels for 1st year students.Out of 3, 2 hostels for boys & 1 hostel for the girls. Seat capacity of the hostels is very limited, so the students can stay at hostels first cum first serve basis.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Football Ground, Volleyball Court, Table Tennis

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Chemistry Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Soil Mechanic Lab, Surveying Lab, Software Engineering Lab, Analog Communication Lab, CAD Lab, Analog Electronic Circuit Lab, Digital Electronics & Integrated Circuit, Design Lab, Thermal Power Engg Lab, Solid Mechanics Lab, Concrete Lab, Engineering Geology Lab, Soil Mechanics Lab-II, Highway & Transportation Engg. Lab, Object Oriented Programming Lab

reviews.review_heading: The college circumstances are very good.
reviews.review_text: College Wi-Fi are very strong, labs are very good, classrooms are clean, the library is very peaceful, and there are many books. The mess canteen is really good and clean. There were medical facilities, and many kinds of sports are available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Average faculty members, good placements in 2024, average infrastructure, and disgusting canteen.
reviews.review_text: Our college has decent Wi-Fi. Classrooms don't have air-conditioning system. Few of the labs have air conditioning but they don't work. Library books are old and outdated, and not in accordance with the latest syllabus. Even the library does not have air conditioning. Canteen is very unclean, and unhealthy foods are served. Speaking of medical services, they don't have any medicine on standby for emergencies. Sports and games consist mostly of indoor games.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement in 2024, really good campus, and good faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college provides us with a lush green campus and excellent infrastructure. Air conditioning is provided in all the labs with all the equipment in fine condition. The college has one central library and a digital library. Wi-Fi is available all over campus. Cheap and good quality food is found in the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied and placements are average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good enough for engineering, the campus is quite big enough, there are medical facilities, there's a basketball court with a gallery and a football ground big enough, the food in the canteen is average and price is also decent like a veg thali with price dal and 2 sabji cost 45 rs with extra price to be 5 rs per serve. There's a small gym, very small though, and sports and games are fine, like tournaments, etc. Happens once a year.

reviews.review_heading: The college is really good, and if you grind, you will achieve.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and course are very good, like the Wi-Fi and the labs, which are very good. The classrooms and library are very clean, and the medical facilities are one of the good things in our college. There is a wide ground for sports and games, and there are various games in our college. They also provide a gym.

reviews.review_heading: Good learning environment with supportive faculty members and decent campus facilities.
reviews.review_text: BCA department at SIT has good facilities like Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, smart classrooms, and a well-stocked library with digital resources. Hostels are decent for first-year students with basic amenities, though many shift to PGs later. Mess and canteen provide hygienic food, medical facilities are available on campus, and students can enjoy both indoor and outdoor sports.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life is peaceful with decent placements. Needs a stronger industry connection.
reviews.review_text: Green-campus college with solid faculty and placements. Wi-fi is available in all the departments. SIT has a central library. SIT has a huge campus area and a well-maintained infrastructure. College has a large playground, basketball court, games rooms, gym, indoor badminton court & volleyball court. Campus area is plastic-free.

reviews.review_heading: No private college is good until you work hard and pursue your dreams.
reviews.review_text: When we were in 1st year of college, they provided us with a well-maintained classroom with 3 AC, which was good. When we entered the 2nd year, we were provided another classroom without AC. College Wi-Fi is really useless; it doesn't work. Classroom and lab are quite good. College canteen food is not good, so most students eat from outside.

reviews.review_heading: All you need to know about SIT.
reviews.review_text: The college doesn't provide hostel facilities, but there are several good PGs and rented apartments available nearby, the college. They also provide 3 meals a day and free Wi-Fi. Talking about the college lab infrastructure, it is sufficiently good. Labs are clean, and desktops are well-managed.

reviews.review_heading: If have a problem with money and want a good college then you can consider it otherwise just don't.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is below average the college campus is too small. Wi-Fi is the worst and even the mobile network doesn't work properly on the campus. Classrooms are okay but the board is very cheap smartlab is also very old. There are no hostel facilities here you have to stay in PG which is widely available around the college. Canteens are good they provide good quality meals at very low prices. Don't expect too much from the sports department it is very poor.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in North Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is weak. Labs are well-equipped. The library is well-maintained. Canteens have delicious food. Classrooms are large and clean. The infrastructure is good. Our college does not offer hostel facilities but we have many PGs, apartments, and rooms near our college.

reviews.review_heading: SIT- A hidden gem in the lap of North Bengal.
reviews.review_text: There are no hostel facilities in our college. During COVID-19, hostel facilities of our college are topped. Coming to the part of facilities and infrastructure of our course. For B.Tech, there is a main building and a desh building which is generally known as 1st year building. Each building has separate Wi-Fi services on separate floors so that no one could face connectivity issues. They are a basic electrical engineering lab, physics lab, chemistry lab, drawing hall, and AutoCAD room in 1st y...

reviews.review_heading: The Siliguri Institute of Technology – The college campus is very good.
reviews.review_text: Moreover, the vibrant campus life adds value, with a variety of extracurricular activities, clubs, and events that encourage students to explore their interests, build networks, and create lasting memories. These factors together contribute to a fulfilling college experience.

reviews.review_heading: An Engineering college in Siliguri .
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good enough to hold various students, including Wi-Fi facilities, which are also good enough. The department's labs and classrooms provided by the college are excellent. Also, the ground present in the college is big enough to hold various matches of cricket and football.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied because of the college faculty and their placement opportunities.
reviews.review_text: The faculty members of my college are very helpful. The infrastructure of the college is well designed. The labs and classrooms are also clean and clear. The library of our college is very beautiful. There are so many books to read. But sometimes the Wi-Fi connection of the college is very poor. There is so much good quality food in our college canteen and the medical facilities are very good. We play a lot of sports and games in our college.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Siliguri Institute of Technology

likes.text: In our college, top companies like TCS, Capgemini, Cognizant, ZS Associates, etc., visit the campus for recruitment.
The training and placement cell is completely involved in tying up with companies in order to provide best opportunities for the students at hand.

Placements.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: Sports facilities such as football court, basketball court, badminton court, volleyball court and also practice pitches for cricket are available on the campus.
In our college, the rooms are very good with proper Wi-Fi facility and also other things.

Infrastructure.info_text: These insights are automatically extracted from student reviews, without any manual intervention

likes.text: They will help you out regarding anything, and every teacher is well qualified from reputed universities.
The course curriculum is quite relevant which helps students to understand any topic taught, in a much easier way.

likes.text: I just love the technology and computer, So I choose the course.
There are events such as book fair, cultural fest, social, and freshers party organised in this college, Also, teachers day is celebrated here every year.

faqs.question: Which companies generally recruit from Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Oriental Institute Bhopal offers undergraduate and postgraduate courses to the students. The courses are offered across various streams such as Engineering and Management. At the UG level, the university offers BTech course in ten specialisations. At the PG level, the university offers MCA and MTech in various specialisations. Aspiring candidates seeking admission to the Oriental Institute of Science and Technology are required to fulfill the minimum eligibility criteria by the institute for the desired course. Below mentioned are OIST Bhopal courses and OIST Bhopal fees:

faqs.answer: A:    The admission to Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal, is relatively easy but competitive. For B.Tech, candidates must obtain at least 45% aggregate marks in the 10+2 examination and have to qualify themselves through the Main exam of JEE. Counseling is carried out based on the scores of candidates acquired in the JEE at the college level. It is not too strenuous to get admission into the college, although some popular specializations may require higher scores as a result of competition. However, students with sufficient preparation and adequate JEE scores are likely to successfully secure admission into OIST.
faqs.question: Is Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal, hard to get?

faqs.answer: A:    For admission to the MCA programme at Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal, candidates are required to submit the following documents: The 10th standard mark sheet carries around 10-15% weight,  12th standard mark sheet carries around 20-25%, graduation mark sheet and degree certificate carries around 40-50% and entrance examination score card carries around 10-20%. Also, the candidates require 4-6 passport size photograph along with the ID proof of any government authorized identity and Caste certificate if required. Other documents of the institute also demanded a gap certificate, if any and a migration certificate. Originals of such documents are,  5-7 sets photocopies needed.
faqs.question: What are the documents required for admission to MCA at Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal?

faqs.answer: A:    A total of 120 seats are available for MCA course at Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal. The duration for the course is two years and mode of study is full-time. This PG degree programme includes course in Information Technology, Operating Systems, Computer Organisation & Architecture, various languages (C, Computer Graphics using C+, JAVA etc.), Database Management Systems, Data Structure, Software Engineering,  Formal Language & Automata Theory, Unix, Dot Net Technology, Artificial Intelligence, Information Storage & Management, Cloud Computing etc.
faqs.question: How many seats are available for MCA at Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, candidate looking for M.Tech admission at Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal will be selected on merit-basis. The institute do not require any entrance exam for M.Tech admissions. The duration for the course is two years. Apart from this, a total of 120 seats are available for M.Tech course.
faqs.question: Can I get admission in M.Tech at Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal without GATE?

reviews_list.review_title: Review of Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is average in college. About 50-55 percent of students get placed on campus, but the students get off-campus placements if they are skilled. TCS, Cisco, and Capgemini are the top companies that visit our college for placements. Roles like AI engineer, software developer, software engineer, etc., are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has a very beautiful and aesthetic building. Many movies are also shot here. Labs have good access to Wi-Fi, and they are clean and tidy. Canteen food is almost good. The hostel has good rooms, but the mess food is of low quality. Sports events are organised in a timely manner.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Nice campus and satisfying facilities.

review_content.Placements: The placement scenario for our batch was quite positive, with around 70–80 percent of eligible students getting placed through campus recruitment. The highest package offered is between 8–12 LPA, the lowest package ranged around 2.5 LPA–3 LPA, and the average package stayed near 3.5–4 LPA. Several well-known companies visited the campus including TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, and a few emerging startups which provided opportunities in both technical and non-technical.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers good infrastructure for the course, with well-equipped labs, stable Wi-Fi, and smart classrooms that make learning easier. The library has enough books and a quiet space for study. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and regular maintenance. The mess provides simple but fresh food, and the canteen offers extra meal options. Basic medical support is available on campus and students also get access to sports grounds and indoor games.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, but the campus is so small and I don’t find any campus life in this college.

content.Placements: Approximately 70–80 percent of students are placed every year. The lowest package is 3.5 LPA, the highest till now is 72 LPA, and the average goes to 5 LPA. Top recruiters are TCS, SLK, Capgemini, HCL, etc. This college doesn’t provide internships.
content.Infrastructure: This college provides a library and labs with internet facilities, but in many areas of the college, jammers are installed. Hostel life on the college campus is really good. They provide food and other facilities like washing machines, common gas, gym, etc. They are not that much focused on sports; there is no such sports room for students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal.

content.Placements: The placement percentage is average in college. About 50-55 percent of students get placed on campus, but the students get off-campus placements if they are skilled. TCS, Cisco, and Capgemini are the top companies that visit our college for placements. Roles like AI engineer, software developer, software engineer, etc., are offered.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a very beautiful and aesthetic building. Many movies are also shot here. Labs have good access to Wi-Fi, and they are clean and tidy. Canteen food is almost good. The hostel has good rooms, but the mess food is of low quality. Sports events are organised in a timely manner.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Nice campus and satisfying facilities.

content.Placements: The placement scenario for our batch was quite positive, with around 70–80 percent of eligible students getting placed through campus recruitment. The highest package offered is between 8–12 LPA, the lowest package ranged around 2.5 LPA–3 LPA, and the average package stayed near 3.5–4 LPA. Several well-known companies visited the campus including TCS, Wipro, Infosys, Capgemini, Cognizant, Tech Mahindra, and a few emerging startups which provided opportunities in both technical and non-technical.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers good infrastructure for the course, with well-equipped labs, stable Wi-Fi, and smart classrooms that make learning easier. The library has enough books and a quiet space for study. Hostel facilities are decent with clean rooms and regular maintenance. The mess provides simple but fresh food, and the canteen offers extra meal options. Basic medical support is available on campus and students also get access to sports grounds and indoor games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Almost everything is okay. I am not very dissatisfied.

content.Placements: At least 50–60% of students from the B.Tech AI/ML course get placed. As AI is one of the top courses nowadays, it will be helpful in the future. The college offers an average package of 3–4 LPA, with the lowest package being 2 LPA and the highest package reaching 72 LPA, which was likely from off-campus placement. Around 40–50% of students get internships from this course. The top companies include TCS, Wipro, Google, Microsoft, and others.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure are average. The lab and equipment are good. The Wi-Fi sometimes works and sometimes does not. The lab computers function properly. Hostel facilities are also okay. Medical facilities are available, and good mess food. Sports and games are conducted at appropriate times.

admission_process.title: Oriental Institute of Science and Technology Admission Process

paragraphs: Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal admissions 2024 enquiry form is open for various programmes. The institute admits BTech students based on national-level entrance exams such as JEE Mains. The mode of application is online. The institute offers a range of undergraduate and postgraduate courses in Engineering and IT & Software. Popular courses offered by the university are BTech, MTech and MCA. However, the MTech course is offered byRGPVexcluding the MTech CSE (AI & ML) course. Read on to know more aboutOriental Institute of Science and Technologycourse admissions 2024.

The institute offers more than 11 courses across various specialisations and aspirants need to apply for courses through the official website. Candidates can read the table below to learn more onOriental Institute of Science and Technology, coursesadmission highlights 2024:
Particulars
OIST Admission Highlights 2024
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
11+ courses across multiple specialisations
How to apply?
https://oistbpl.com/oist-bhopal/index.php
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes
NOTE:The information available in the above table is sourced from the official website.

Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal offers courses in the fields ofEngineeringand IT & Software. Students seeking admission must meet the course-specific eligibility and selection conditions. The below-mentioned table carries course-wise eligibility and selection criteria for Oriental Institute of Science and Technology course admissions 2024:
Eligibility

Oriental Institute of Science and Technology admission process includes registration, selection and admission confirmation. Candidates must follow the below steps to get a seat in Oriental Institute of Science and Technology:
STEP 1: Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal
Application Process 2024

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the university. Candidates need to pay an application fee. To know the application fee amount students need to visit the official website.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds

Oriental Institute of Science and Technology shortlists BTech candidates based on JEE Main + College Level Counselling. The selection criteria for the MTech course is a GATE score. However, the students will be selected based on merit for MCA courses.
STEP 3: Merit List andAdmission Confirmation

Once selection rounds are over, the Institute releases a merit list. Selected aspirants are allotted seat in the Institute. Candidates need to pay the course fee to confirm their seat in the Institute.

The institute has specializations in Computer Science Engineering, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, Automobile Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electronics & Communication Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Information Technology, Mechanical Engineering, Power Engineering.

faqs.question: What is the admission procedure for admission at Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal?

faqs.question: Is Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal, hard to get?
faqs.answer: The admission to Oriental Institute of Science and Technology, Bhopal, is relatively easy but competitive. For B.Tech, candidates must obtain at least 45% aggregate marks in the 10+2 examination and have to qualify themselves through the Main exam of JEE. Counseling is carried out based on the scores of candidates acquired in the JEE at the college level. It is not too strenuous to get admission into the college, although some popular specializations may require higher scores as a result of competition. However, students with sufficient preparation and adequate JEE scores are likely to successfully secure admission into OIST.

reviews.review_heading: Review of the AI and machine learning course at OIST.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very well maintained. There is a proper laboratory for every field. Computer labs have high-level working computers with proper Wi-Fi. The library has good books. Hostel food is being checked by faculty members to maintain hygiene. Sports and games facilities are average.

They provide food and other facilities like washing machines, common gas, gym, etc. They are not that much focused on sports; there is no such sports room for students.

reviews.review_heading: The Oriental Institute of Science and Technology is absolutely great, good in placements and campus.

reviews.review_heading: Vibe of Oriental Institute.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very beautiful, with aesthetic gardens and places to sit. The canteen food is also very good. Wi-Fi is available in computer laboratories. Proper laboratories for every field are present in the college. Hostel life is good, but the mess food is not of high quality. Overall, life at the college is good.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life and vibe of Oriental Institute.

Sports and games facilities are available only during some events.

reviews.review_heading: The campus life of Oriental.

Labs are good, and computer labs are well air-conditioned as well. Hostel rooms are okay but mess food is like 2/5. Medical and sports facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Life at OIST unfiltered.

This happens to be my favourite place for studying and being in.

The library had a variety of books and was a good place for learning, with a calm environment. The college infrastructure was very beautiful and aesthetic, with nature and cleanliness around.

college_info.intro:
Navrachana University offers UG, PG, and PhD courses through 5 schools of study, including Business and Law, Engineering & Technology, Liberal Studies and Education, Science, and others. MBA and BTech are among the most popular programmes offered at the university.
Navrachana University in Vadodara offers a full-time, four-year BTech programme at the UG level. review_summary.college_name: Navrachana University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: The best college in Vadodara.

content.Placements: 100 percent of students got placed from our college. The highest package is 34 LPA, and the average is 5 LPA-6 LPA. All the students got internships in companies like TCS. The top role offered is software engineer. The main head of placement has international connections, which gives placement outside too.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is accessible throughout the campus. The library is too big and has access to all the books. Classrooms are well-equipped with an air conditioning unit. There is PG right opposite the college, and the quality of food available is good. Sports are given importance, and the medical facilities provided are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: Really helpful teachers and good amenities.

content.Placements: 100 percent of students are placed from the batch of 2024. The highest package offered is 34 LPA in the year 2023. The average package is 4–5 LPA. Top recruiting companies include TCS, PayPal, etc. Top roles include software development engineer, marketing engineer, and HR roles.
content.Infrastructure: Free and fast Wi-Fi is available on campus. Labs and classrooms are properly designed, and the number of students is kept limited. Most classrooms are equipped with air-conditioning systems. The quality of food available in the canteen is amazing, and students love eating there. There is an active committee for sports and activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2026

But that's not exactly a reflection, since students also work as freelancers due to the nature of our course. Top recruitment companies would include production houses, advertising agencies, newsrooms, and brands looking for social media managers or content strategists. 100 percent of students got internships, as they are mandatory. Top roles include content writing, graphic design, social media managers, etc.

individual_reviews.title: A university that has multiple benefits.

Even the college has multiple recruiters and sometimes they also recruit students in the college only. Internships are provided to all students in the first year, which is a must and compulsory for all students. The average package provided to students is 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The best thing about the college is the infrastructure only. The college has 3 buildings with aesthetic and beautiful artwork. The hostel mess is also good they serve multiple types of food which is rich in taste. The menu of the canteen keeps on changing as the college has multiple kinds of students who have different tastes.

content.Placements: Approximately 89% of students secured placements. Over 500 companies participated in the placement drives. More than 600 job roles are offered to students.
content.Infrastructure: Navrachana University in Vadodara offers a range of facilities to support both academic pursuits and comfortable living for its students. Campus wide Wi Fi connectivity is available, including classrooms, libraries and common areas, uninterrupted internet access. It also provides laboratories equipped with the latest tools and technology. It has specialized labs for engineering, science and computer applications, including 3D printers and simulation software.

Data Science degrees include an MBA, B.Tech, B.Des, B.Sc., B.Ed., B.Arch, and B.Sc. offered by Navrachana University.

admission_process.title: Navrachana University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Navrachana University Vadodara admissionis offered in online mode only. The University offers courses such as BTech, BArch, BBA, BSc, BA, Bachelor of Landscape Architecture Design (BLAD) and BDes programme at UG level, MTech, MBA, MSc, MSW and B.Ed at PG level and PhD programme in various disciplines at doctorate level. Navrachana University application process is conducted in online mode only.
lists: Admission to BCA and BBA is based on the scores obtained in the entrance exam conducted by Navrachana University, followed by a Personal Interview (PI)
Admission to BBA LLB is based on CLAT, LSAT or Written Aptitude Test (WAT) and PI
For BTech admission, 75% seats are filled throughAdmission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC)and rest of the 25% seats through JEE Main scores
Admission to BA (Mass Communication and Journalism) is done through marks obtained in the entrance exam conducted by NU Vadodara
For BSc and BSc+MSc admission, PI round is conducted for final selection
All candidates must have a valid NATA score for admission to BArch programme
Admission to BLAD and BDes is done throughSEDA Common Entrance Exam(in-house test), Drawing Test and PI
In case of MBA, candidates are shortlisted for admission through an entrance test conducted within the University or a valid CMAT score
MTech admission is based on a valid GATE score, followed by a PI round
Selection of candidates to MSc (Environmental Science) and B.Ed is based on PI round
Candidates are shortlisted for PhD based on their performance in the PI

faqs.question: What is the accepted entrance exam for MBA admission at Navrachana University?
faqs.answer: Navrachana University's MBA admissions are regulated by theAdmission Committee for Professional Courses (ACPC). The committee conducts counselling for MBA admissions in Gujarat. It releases merit lists based on the applicants' CMAT scores. Hence, CMAT is the accepted entrance exam for MBA admissions through ACPC.For admissions under the Management Quota, the university conducts a Written Aptitude Test (WAT). The applicants' performance in Graduation and a PI are also evaluated.

faqs.question: How to apply for BA (Hons) admission in Navrachana University?
faqs.answer: Navrachana University conducts its application/ registration process in online mode. Candidates seeking admission can register through the official website of the university. The application window usually opens between February and July, every year (tentative).On the homepage of the official website, candidates must click on 'Apply now'. They can fill out the registration form on the redirected page. While doing so, they must select their desired BA (Hons) specialisations. The application process is incomplete without submitting the prescribed application fee.

paragraphs: The highest salary recorded during placement drive 2024 at Navrachana University was 34.60 LPA. The average package was 4.4 LPA. For B.Tech, BSc Data Science, MBA , BBA and B.Ed. , placement rate was 100% . The overall placement rate was 89%. Over 600 offers were made from more than 500 companies.

faqs.question: How are the placements at Navrachana University?
faqs.answer: The highest salary recorded during placement drive 2024 at Navrachana University was 34.60 LPA. The average package was 4.4 LPA. The overall placement rate was 89%. Over 600 offers were made from more than 500 companies. The key highlights of Navrachana University placements 2024 are tabulated below: Particulars Placement Statistics (2024) the highest package INR 34.60 LPA Average package INR 4.40 LPA Average package of top 10 percentile INR 10.17 LPA Placement rate 89% Participating recruiters 500+ Job offers 600+

faqs.question: What do students say about Navrachana University BTech placements?
faqs.answer: Various students have provided Navrachana University reviews on Shiksha.com. Based on some recently posted reviews, the university placed approximately 89% of its students. Over 500 companies participated in the placement drives and offered more than 600 job roles. The highest CTC was INR 34.6 LPA, the lowest was INR 4.40 LPA. The average CTC was INR 10.17 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies were Paypal, Alembic, MRF, Morris Garage Motors, TCS, Zydus, ICICI Bank, HDFC Bank, and Kotak Bank.

faqs.answer: Navrachana University BSc (Hons) fee structure include the tuition fee and a caution deposit. While the tuition fee varies across the BSc (Hons) specialisations offered at the university, the caution deposit (refundable) of INR 10,000 is the same for students enrolled in all specialisations. Certain fee elements are one-time payments to be made at the time of Navrachana University admission, whereas others are recurring as per the norms of the institution fee policy.

cut_off.college_name: Navrachana University Cutoff 2025: Check GUJCET Round Wise Ranks

description: NUV cutoff 2025 is finally out for candidates seeking admission to BTech and BPharma programs. The GUJCET cutoff has been released for all categories and rounds for students belonging to the HS and AI quota. Candidates can also view other exam cutoffs from the exam-wise sections given below. Further updates are down below:

The NUV cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. hostel_campus.college_name: Navrachana University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Navrachana University has a very good hostel facility for both boys and girls, situated at a distance of around 1.5 kms from the University campus. There is a bus service for commuting from the hostel to the campus at specific intervals and scheduled timings. Allotment of accommodation in the hostel is on first-come-first-served basis. The hostel building has three floors. The ground floor houses the Hostel Warden’s Office, and the classrooms for NavKaushalya, a Navrachana training institute for girls and women (9 am to 6 pm). The first floor houses the boys wing and the second floor houses the girls wing. Both have separate entrances and there are no inter-connections to ensure privacy and security. Around 42 girls and 48 boys can be accommodated in the hostel. Each large, well-ventilated room in the hostel admeasuring 430 sq feet accommodates 6 students. All rooms are furnished with comfortable beds, reading desks and storage facilities for students staying there. There are 6 common washrooms (3 toilets and 3 bathrooms attached with geysers) on both floors. Hostel rooms are cleaned regularly on a daily basis. The public areas in the hostel are monitored by CCTV. There is a common lobby space on each floor separating the boys and girls. The common room has a television for leisure and recreation, and a table tennis playing facility. There is an outdoor throw ball/ volleyball court as well. There is 24 x 7 security at the hostel entrance and all entries are recorded in the security log book. The hostel is supported by a good canteen and a common dining facility which is located on the ground floor. It serves hygienic, vegetarian, freshly made food to all hostelites, at scheduled timings.

library.description: The library is proud to possess more than 12,000 volumes from leading authors of India and abroad. The library subscribes to various national journals in the print format, periodicals and magazines. The Navrachana University’s Library consistently caters to the requirements of students and faculty members of all the programmes of bachelors and masters degree.

reviews.review_heading: The best college in Vadodara.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is accessible throughout the campus. The library is too big and has access to all the books. Classrooms are well-equipped with an air conditioning unit. There is PG right opposite the college, and the quality of food available is good. Sports are given importance, and the medical facilities provided are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Really helpful teachers and good amenities.
reviews.review_text: Free and fast Wi-Fi is available on campus. Labs and classrooms are properly designed, and the number of students is kept limited. Most classrooms are equipped with air-conditioning systems. The quality of food available in the canteen is amazing, and students love eating there. There is an active committee for sports and activities.

reviews.review_heading: A satisfactory college and shapes you to step into the real world.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided on a singular device to each student, classrooms are diversified, from seminar halls to regular classrooms, and even classrooms optimised for different batches. The library is well-connected and has access to numerous academic sources and data-based resources, and it is partnered with the MSU Library. Hostel facilities are available nearby as well as PGs, and the canteen food is passable. Professors often eat at the canteen themselves. The sports room is available, and the medi...

reviews.review_heading: A university that has multiple benefits.
reviews.review_text: The best thing about the college is the infrastructure only. The college has 3 buildings with aesthetic and beautiful artwork. The hostel mess is also good they serve multiple types of food which is rich in taste. The menu of the canteen keeps on changing as the college has multiple kinds of students who have different tastes.

reviews.review_heading: Strong infrastructure, facilities, good placements, but academic experience varies.
reviews.review_text: Navrachana University in Vadodara offers a range of facilities to support both academic pursuits and comfortable living for its students. Campus wide Wi Fi connectivity is available, including classrooms, libraries and common areas, uninterrupted internet access. It also provides laboratories equipped with the latest tools and technology. It has specialized labs for engineering, science and computer applications, including 3D printers and simulation software.

reviews.review_heading: I am happy with my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of my campus was neat and clean and had all the facilities I needed. The campus was great. There were medical facilities, a sports room, a basketball court, two elevators, and a canteen.

reviews.review_heading: I am fully satisfied with my university .
reviews.review_text: I had already visited my University and was amazed by such an awesome infrastructure- Neat and clean floors, classes, labs. Wi-Fi is also available for everyone in campus. Library is big and have pc in it and consists of all amazing knowledgeable books. Medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: Students have access to Wi-Fi throughout the campus, and the labs are clean and well-maintained. The library is spacious and equipped with computers and knowledgeable books. The canteen food is also delicious, and medical facilities are available. The classrooms are air-conditioned, and the washrooms are regularly cleaned.

reviews.review_heading: My journey in my incredible college.
reviews.review_text: There are two buildings of our college, and every building is of 6 floors, and now the college is adding 4 more floors. The college provides Wi-Fi for every student, and for the business students, there are 4 ACs in every class. In the college, every class contains big projectors with CCTV cameras and good furniture for sitting. The labs are perfect, and they also take responsibility for cleanliness. The facilities provided in the hostel are free Wi-Fi, a free gym, and one swimming pool.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely More Better than expected, good placements in 2023,good infrastructure and facilities
reviews.review_text:
Infrastructure is Well maintained, neat and clean and even washrooms are clean. Classroom, labs with good working Pc and Instruments are available. Big library with Informative books and sufficient space to sit and read is there and even computer is installed in library. 
Canteen's Food also Good & Healthy enough to eat and good sports room.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Navrachana University.
reviews.review_text: Some of the classrooms have AC's in them; the labs are in working condition but not that good. Most of the students bring their own laptops. The library has most of the required books, and it is quite big but fills up during exam time. There is no dedicated hostel for the college so I can't comment on that. The canteen of the college is good but again, it is small.

reviews.review_heading: Amazing environment provided by the university. The faculty members are highly qualified.
reviews.review_text: The university provides various different classrooms for different courses. Each class is equipped with projectors for easing the learning and teaching process. Fans in each room and windows for proper ventilation. The lighting is also excellent. Many classes have also been equipped with Air Conditioning facility.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with all the facilities.
reviews.review_text: Labs are good and classrooms are huge for all the students with comfortable sitting arrangements. Facilities are very good. There are different types of games. It is a very interesting and enjoyable college.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of good faculty members, helpful nature and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The labs are well maintained and also the classrooms are near and clean with Wi-Fi services and also projector and blackboard for easy understanding and learning. The quality of food is hygienic also the rooms and bathrooms of the hostel are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Best University. Still you need to make efforts in order ripe a fruit out of it.
reviews.review_text: I am getting free Wi-Fi provided by the University. You just need to register it at the office. They are providing us a great speed Wi-Fi. Labs are also well maintained. Regular checking of all instruments and appliances is done. Cleanliness is also maintained. Food quality is also good in mess and canteen. Many games and sports are also played. There is a football court too along with a cricket and a basketball court. Indoor games are available too.

paragraphs: Navrachana University offers a scholarship to meritorious and deserving candidates. The institute offers scholarships based on need and merit. Below-mentioned are the Navrachana University scholarships:

Navrachana University offers a scholarship to a high scholarship record and in need of financial assistance. The scholarship is offered as part of the tuition fee to students whose family's combined income does not exceed INR 8 LPA and have scored a minimum 70% in HSC for UG programmes or 7 CGPA in UG level for PG programmes. faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

hostel_campus.college_name: Genba Sopanrao Moze College Of Engineering Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostel facilities with well furnished rooms are available for girls.All amenities like mess, xerox center, STD booth, etc.have also been provided. Hostel is equipped with 6000 ltr/day solar heater water system for providing hot water. Internet browsing(wi-fi) facility is available to all students.

Hostel facilities with well furnished rooms are available for girls.All amenities like mess, xerox center, STD booth, etc.have also been provided. Hostel is equipped with 6000 ltr/day solar heater water system for providing hot water. Internet browsing(wi-fi) facility is available to all students.

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Computer Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab

reviews.review_heading: It has a good college campus and atmosphere.
reviews.review_text: Average laboratories, a library, and a reading room are available in each building. Classrooms are below average type, and the Wi-Fi connection is quite good. There is a hostel for girls but boys hostel is not available. Boys have to stay by themselves but there are a lot of PGs nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Genba Sopanrao Moze College Of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities like the library, computer labs, and projectors in the classroom are provided by the college. There is no canteen in the college. The hostel is only available for girls and not for boys. The infrastructure of the college is okay but needs to be improved.

reviews.review_heading: It offers great faculty members, events, and placements upto 7 LPA in 2014, stay focused and excel.
reviews.review_text: My college has average infrastructure, sometimes classrooms are not kept clean and not much facilities. Hostel is not so good, including its mess food. College fans and electricity are not so proper. Washrooms smell a lot, both girls and boys. They need to look after that.

reviews.review_heading: Excellent faculty, strong curriculum, and vibrant campus life.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good infrastructure. The environment is good. Classes are quite old-fashioned. They provide projectors in all classes. All of them work well. I am currently attending my 2nd year of a master of computer application. It is a nice experience.

reviews.review_heading: About the average college that you want admission if you just want a degree.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is below average. Our college has department-wise buildings and floors but not too good. Interior of the classrooms is too bad like not good benches. It is a normal college. There are no smart classrooms and our college is average.

reviews.review_heading: The best review of the college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities include an emergency room, drinking water, washrooms for girls and boys, a library, etc. The college also has Wi-Fi, labs for each subject, computer labs, and clean classrooms. The food available in the mess is good and tasty. Medical, sports, and gaming facilities are excellent. The hostel facilities are good and cooperative.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is great, but the infrastructure can be improved. Placement should be improved.
reviews.review_text: Many facilities such as the library, computer labs, and projectors in the classroom are provided by the college. There is no canteen in the college. The hostel is only available for girls and not for boys. The infrastructure of the college is okay but needs to be improved.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty members and placements are not good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very bad. There is no proper ground owned by this college itself. It is a public ground even college does not have any canteen and other facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Genba Sopanrao Moze College Balewadi.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are good with adequate spacing for lots of students. The practical labs are also equipped with good computers and great Wi-Fi. All the software is installed for the ease of students. The college library is also great and has many reference books.

reviews.review_heading: A College for a Job Person
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility is decent, allows three students in a room with separate lockers and beds. Mess is also good, medical facilities and also a large playground for games like football and cricket. Not really a crowded place, might be good for some people but if you want to enjoy hostel life, then this isn't really good.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure and faculty are very good.
reviews.review_text: Infra is not better, but good. The teachers are very supportive, and it helps to crack the exam. The hostel is available for only girls. There is a big ground available for students, and sports games are occurring in the college. The library is good. Entry to the campus is not allowed without a college ID.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good faculty, infrastructure and placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college do not have boys hostel but it has girls hostel, which is 4-story building which is well maintained by the college staff and our college mess and canteen serve good and healthy food to everyone and hostel mess is also good, as we came to know by our female friends.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Genba Sopanrao Moze College of Engineering, Baner-Balewadi, Pune.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very big library with well-equipped books. They also provide students with books for competitive exams such as MPSC and UPSC. The college doesn't have a canteen, but there are many shops and restaurants opposite the college gate where the food is good. The college also encourages its students to take part in sports activities such as football, cricket, MMA, etc.

reviews.review_heading:
Average college 
This college is only for achieving degree .
reviews.review_text: Only few students are placed in my college and 7 lacs is the highest package offered. No top company has come till now. Maximum 5 to 7 students got internship in our college. Most of the students got placement by off campus and other students pass out without job.

reviews.review_heading: Genba Sopanrao Moze College of Engineering, Balewadi, Pune.
reviews.review_text: This college is located in Pune city and has a good enough campus. It includes a library, computer lab, workshop, and a large ground. Additionally, there is a girls' hostel and gym available. The college provides good, spacious classrooms with proper seating arrangements.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Design - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college when compared to other Mumbai colleges.

review_content.Placements: The highest package offered is 13-15 LPA, and the average package is 3-4 LPA. The recruiting companies include TCS, Infosys, and Wipro. The roles offered to students are generally in web development, and the same companies provide internships with a stipend of around Rs. 8,000 to Rs. 10,000.
review_content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities like a cafeteria, gym, and clubhouse for playing games like carrom, chess, and 8-ball pool. The classrooms are very spacious and contain projectors. The college doesn't provide any hostel facilities, so students living away from home have to rent a house nearby.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: There are satisfactory placements and faculty members at this college.

review_content.Placements: Enough placement opportunities are given to students at this college. Around 40-45% of the students get placements at this college. College management tries its best for the student's placements. Most of the students get placements in the software development and testing fields.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. College facilities are well-maintained and available for all students. Classrooms are big enough with proper seats. Labs, library, Wi-Fi, and various other facilities are available for students. Multiple sports facilities are also given to the students.

content.Placements: My batch is 2022-2026, B.E Computer Engineering. Around 30 to 40 percent of students from my course got placed. The highest package is around 6 LPA. The average is about 3 LPA to 4 LPA, and the lowest is around 3 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Capgemini, Accenture, and Tech Mahindra visited regularly. Around 30 percent of students received internships in firms like TCS, Cognizant, and Capgemini. The top roles offered were Software Developer, QA Engineer, Analyst, and Support Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Our department has well-equipped computer labs. Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms. Digital library access and project labs for practical learning. The campus Wi-Fi is generally reliable. Hostel rooms are decent with regular cleaning. And the mess food is average but hygienic. 2 Sports grounds are available. Classrooms are spacious and have projectors, and the library offers good study material.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: New Horizons Institute of Technology and Management has better infrastructure and good faculty.

content.Placements: Placement cell tells students before admission that they will get 100% placement. But at the end its wrong, many students don't get placed. Companies like TCS and Wipro hire students. Many students go for off-campus placements. Overall, less students get placed.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is the best. But in classrooms, AC is fitted but they do not turn on during summer. Wi-Fi is not good. College computers are old, and some work properly. But some of the computers do not even start, and they lag continuously. It makes students wait and not get their lab outputs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Design - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college when compared to other Mumbai colleges.

content.Placements: The highest package offered is 13-15 LPA, and the average package is 3-4 LPA. The recruiting companies include TCS, Infosys, and Wipro. The roles offered to students are generally in web development, and the same companies provide internships with a stipend of around Rs. 8,000 to Rs. 10,000.
content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities like a cafeteria, gym, and clubhouse for playing games like carrom, chess, and 8-ball pool. The classrooms are very spacious and contain projectors. The college doesn't provide any hostel facilities, so students living away from home have to rent a house nearby.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: There are satisfactory placements and faculty members at this college.

content.Placements: Enough placement opportunities are given to students at this college. Around 40-45% of the students get placements at this college. College management tries its best for the student's placements. Most of the students get placements in the software development and testing fields.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. College facilities are well-maintained and available for all students. Classrooms are big enough with proper seats. Labs, library, Wi-Fi, and various other facilities are available for students. Multiple sports facilities are also given to the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Everything you need to know about NHITM.

content.Placements: The highest package offered was 7 to 8 Lacs, and the average package is 3-4 Lacs. The recruiting companies include TCS, INFOSYS, and WIPRO. The roles offered to students are generally in web development, and the same companies provide internships with a stipend of around 8000 to 10000.
content.Infrastructure: There are many facilities like a cafeteria, gym, and clubhouse for playing games like carrom, chess, and 8-ball pool. The classrooms are very spacious and contain projectors. The college doesn't provide any hostel facilities, so students living away from home have to rent a house nearby.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: Everything you need to know about NHITM.
reviews.review_text: There are many facilities like a cafeteria, gym, and clubhouse for playing games like carrom, chess, and 8-ball pool. The classrooms are very spacious and contain projectors. The college doesn't provide any hostel facilities, so students living away from home have to rent a house nearby.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and placement opportunities at the New Horizon Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like Ethernet, with or without AC classrooms, a nice environment and aroma, cleanliness and hygiene at the mess, a canteen, labs having new Intel-based computers with Windows 11, and each lab having about 20 computers. Talking about the library, it was vast and silent; if someone doesn't want to attend class, they can go to library, which has a number of books, including Previous year papers, Data Structure and algorithms, computing, IOT, etc. Other than this, there's a room for medic...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides good and huge infrastructure. We have labs. They are always open. Our college has a good library. It has all books. All classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: College infrastructure, placements, faculty, and facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure of our course are excellent, Free Wi-Fi in the college. Every department has there own labs, and they provide PC to every student. The classrooms and the library are better. Our college does not provide Hostel but sports are much better than other colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Review of New Horizon Institute of Technology & Management.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. There is a huge playground. It also has a big turf but no allowance to play. This college is still under construction. There is no hostel in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The canteen is not good. They won't provide new food items. Classrooms are spacious. Benches are new and good. Labs are not good. Washrooms are not good because of the open taps and no mirrors.

reviews.review_heading: Decent engineering college .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good but lacks AC  in labs and classrooms. Basic facilities are available like common room, ground, and sports items are also available. There are two auditoriums and have six lifts but students are not allowed to use them.

reviews.review_heading: College life was decent, but I still haven't got my deposit even after 2 years from passing out.
reviews.review_text: The college has a good infrastructure. The classrooms are very spacious and well-ventilated, with acoustic properties. The campus is located in a residential area which makes it very safe for girls. The canteen was okay. The cleaning staff always kept the college clean, and the students were asked to maintain it as well.

reviews.review_heading: Average satisfaction because of very poor management in teachers and classes, a ground for college.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi, labs are very old and poorly kept, and the library is updated very frequently. No permanent mess and canteen, there were no medical facilities as such seen. Sports are self-conducted by students, the corridors are huge but we are not allowed to roam, and students are not allowed to go out.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is the worst.
reviews.review_text: Labs will not work. Classrooms have fans that don't work. Everything broken is normal. Canteen is smaller than the washrooms. Garden is for poultry farm. They breed ducks, chickens, fishes, etc. feels like a farm instead of a college. Wi-Fi password is not provided.

reviews.review_heading: I love the college infrastructure and also the teaching orders.
reviews.review_text: There are so no hostels. The college is big enough, but there is no sort of accommodation. Any student coming from outstation needs to find a nearby guest house or be at a rented house. There are many such availabilities in this city so there shouldn't be any problem.

highlights.summary: Vedam School of Technology 2026 admissions are open. Interested students can apply directly on the college's website for the UG programme.

college_info.intro:
Vedam School of Technology popular programme is BTech. The school offers BTech programme at the UG level for the duration of 4-years. The school offers comprehensive, industry-oriented curriculum, designed to equip students with advanced skills in artificial intelligence and software. BTech students can secure entry level jobs like Software Engineer, Data Analyst, Technical Support Engineer, QA Tester & Graduate Engineer Trainee in IT, manufacturing & core engineering sectors.
Vedam School of Technology focuses on enhancing the learning experience through practical exposure, industry-driven coursework, and expert mentorship, preparing students for successful careers in the tech industry. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at Vedam School of Technology Pune in the table provided below:

placements.overview: Vedam School of Technology offers scholarships under 3 categories. The institute provides scholarships of up to 100% based on Merit, Gender, and Financial Need. Vedam School of Technology provides multiple financing options including merit based scholarships, Women in Tech scholarships & need based scholarships. Additionally the school facilitates education loans through partners

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Vedam School of Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students. The college, in partnership with ADYPU, is mainly concerned with the Engineering and Technology stream and offers a BTech (AI) programme to students at the UG level. Vedam School of Technology Pune courses are offered to students in full-time mode and the degree provided by the partner ADYPU is UGC approved. It offers a practical approach to curriculum, focusing on coding from day 1, with IIT professors and MAANG experts delivering the curriculum. Vedam School of Technology total tution fees is .

faqs.answer: A:    Vedam School of Technology admissions are open for the academic year 2025. The college offers a BTech programme to students at the UG level across several specialisations. Vedam School of Technology admission is completely entrance-based. The entrance exams accepted by Vedam School of Technology are JEE Main and Vedam Scholastic Aptitude Test (VSAT). Further, candidates seeking admission to the BTech programme must be Class 12 passed with a minimum 50% aggregate (PCM subjects).
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech at Vedam School of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    No you cannot take BTech course at Vedam School of Technology without entrance exam. Admission is completely entrance based, requiring candidates to appear for the Vedam Scholastic Aptitude Test & Personal Interview to evaluate problem solving & technical skills.

admission_overview.description: Vedam School of Technology admissions 2026 completely entrance-based. The Vedam School of Technology offers four year BTech CS (AI) course at the UG level in full-time mode. The course is approved by UG and and offered in collobaration with Ajeenkya DY Patil University (ADYPU). Admissions to the course are strictly based on VSAT - Vedam Scholastic Aptitude Test (VSAT) scores. Interested applicants can apply online through Vedam’s official website. More details about Vedam School of Technology admissions can be found in the following sections.

eligibility_selection.description: Vedam School of Technology course admissions are offered based on preset admission criteria. Students need to meet the basic eligibility and also clear the selection rounds. The minimum qualification required for the course is to complete Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics from a recognised board. Final selection is based on VSAT only. Tabulated below is the detailed eligibility criteria and selection for Vedam School of Technology courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with minimum 50% aggregate (PCM subjects)

faqs.answer: Vedam School of Technology BTech eligibility for admission is to pass Class 12 with at least 50%. Students must have opted for Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics subjects in Class 12. Final selection is made based on VSAT score.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for Vedam School of Technology admission?

faqs.answer: No, Vedam School of Technology does not accept JEE Mains. The institute admits students solely on Vedam Scholastic Aptitude test (VSAT) scores. No other exams are accepted by the institute for admissions to its BTech programme.
faqs.question: Does Vedam School of Technology accept JEE Main for admission?

faqs.answer: Vedam School of Technology application process is completely online. Students can apply on the online application portal of the college at (apply.vedam.org/). Moreover, they must pay an application fee of INR 1,000, simultaneously.

faqs.answer: Total course fee for BTech 4 year programme for academic year 2025 was 18 Lacs excluding hostel and mess charges. Fee for academic year 2026 will be announced soon. For detailed breakdown of fee structure & available financing options go to Vedam website.
