admission_process.title: Vedam School of Technology Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Vedam School of Technology admission process includes application, selection, and admission confirmation. Students need to appear for the Vedam Scholastic Aptitude Test for admission. TheVedam School of Technology admission processcan be completed by the following steps:
Application Process
Apply online on the website of Vedam School of Technology for VSAT and UG course admission. Candidates must also pay an application fee of INR 1,000 before submitting the final application form.
Selection Rounds

Vedam School of Technology admission is completely entrance-based. Candidates need to qualify for VSAT exam, followed by a PI round. Within twelve days of the interview, students will be called for counselling session.
Final Admission
Selected students need to pay the admission fees and report for verification of documents to complete the admission process.

Moreover, candidates must also fulfil the basic eligibility requirements as defined by the college. The minimum qualification for the course admission is to complete Class 12 with a minimum aggregate of 50% with PCM subjects.See below the key highlights for Vedam School of Technology BTech:

faqs.question: Is JEE Main compulsory for admission to BTech at Vedam School of Technology?
faqs.answer: No, JEE Main is not compulsory  for the selection of candidates to BTech programme. The college also considers scores ofVedam Scholastic Aptitude Test (VSAT).The qualified candidates must also perform well in PI round conducted by the college.

faqs.question: How can I join BTech Vedam School of Technology?
faqs.answer: To join BTech at Vedam School of Technology, candidates must pass Class 12 with 50% aggregate with PCM as subjects. Morever, the final selection is done based on candidates's qualfying scores in VSAT exams. Moreover, a PI round is also conducted for the final selection.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for BTech at Vedam School of Technology?
faqs.answer: Vedam School of Technology offers a wide range of programmes to students. The college is mainly concerned with the Engineering and Technology stream and offers a BTech programme to students at the UG level. Vedam School of Technology offers BTech programme in CS (AI) specialisations. There are a total of 360 seats available for the programme.

faqs.question: How to get admission to Vedam School of Technology?
faqs.answer: The admission process at Vedam School of Technology comprises different steps. Candidates must meet the basic eligibility requirements of the programme to participate in the selection process. All the detailed steps are as follows:Fulfil the basic eligibility criteria as per the requirementApply on the college's official websiteTake the VSAT Exam- Vedam Scholastic Aptitude Test and submit the scoreAppear in the Personal Interview roundParticipate in the counselling session and block the seat by paying a token fee of INR 50,000.

faqs.question: Which entrance exam is accepted by Vedam School of Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, admission to Vedam School of Technology is completely entrance-based. Candidates either need to qualify for the college-level Vedam Scholastic Aptitude Test (VSAT) exam. The final selection is done based on candidates performance in the PI round.

faqs.question: What is the fee for Vedam School of Technology?
faqs.answer: Vedam School of Technology fee structure comprises multiple components. The total fee for BTech programme at the college is INR 18 lakh. Moreover, candidates must also pay an application fee of INR 1,000. Further, a token fee of INR 50,000 must also be paid to confirm the seat during the counselling session.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in Vedam School of Technology after Class 12?
faqs.answer: Yes you can get admission to Vedam School of Technology after Class 12 provided you have studied Physics, Chemistry & Mathematics & achieved at least 50% aggregate marks in your 12th board exams. Admission is primarily based on Vedam Scholastic Aptitude Test or JEE Main scores.

college_info.intro:
Swami Vivekanand University MP gives UG and PG courses across multiple streams such as Education, Law, Science, Hotel Management, Nursing, etc. The popular programmes at Vivekanand University Sagar are MBA, BSc, and BTech.
Vivekanand University MP has a full-time, 4-year BTech programme at the UG level. The BTech courses given at the university cover courses in the areas of Mechanical, Civil, Electrical and Electronics, Agriculture, Information Technology, etc. The MBA programme given by the Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Madhya Pradesh is a 2-year programme. It is given in several specialisations, including Fire and Safety Management, Disaster Management, and Hotel Management.
Vivekanand University Sagar MP also gives several programmes in distance learnig mode. Below mentioned are Swami Vivekanand University popular programmes:

reviews_list.review_title: SVN University Sagar MBA Review.

review_content.Placements: Enrolling in this private university ensures a secure career with excellent placement opportunities. It is a top-rated university in the Sagar district, and reputable companies like RSPL Limited actively hire talent from this institute. Many local companies also provide internships for students, contributing to a well-rounded experience. The average package ranges from 3–4 LPA, with the highest reaching 7 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is modern, featuring contemporary building designs, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, computer labs with smart technology, and widespread Wi-Fi across the campus. The hostel is conveniently located near the institute building, and regular sports activities are organized.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: SVN has a nice campus and placement service.

review_content.Placements: SVN is the only private university in Sagar. If you're looking to take admission at this institution, that's good for your career. They have a good network with companies that hire many students from here. P&G's highest salary offer for an assistant manager role is over 7.64 lacs per year.
review_content.Infrastructure: It is a modern-type institution with the best facilities and a large campus for all course students. Classrooms are highly facilitated and well designed. Wi-fi services are open to everyone around campus. The canteen is close to the institute, and the food is excellent. Sports activities are held every weekend.

reviews_list.batch_info: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Swami Vivekanand Vishwavidyalaya review.

review_content.Placements: SVN is the only private university in Sagar City. They are a reputed institute. All local industries come to visit and hire. Most business sector companies hire from these; the highest salary is 7 LPA, and the average package is 3 LPA at the university. The top role offered is manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: This university has a modern, advanced-designed infrastructure, well-furnished classrooms, and an A.C. cabin for officials only, a fully-stocked library, and labs for other practical works. Here is a hostel outside of the city with a nice mess and good food quality; the canteen food is very tasty and hygienic.

faqs.answer: Swami Vivekananda University is a private University managed by Prakhar Pragya Siksha Prasar Avum Samaj Kalayan Samiti, Madhya Pradesh. The University is UGC approved and is recognised by AICTE and ISO. The university offers several programs across various streams of Arts, Commerce, Science, Designing, Engineering etc.Admissions to Swami Vivekananda University are based on the scores obtained in Entrance exams. MBA and M.Tech admissions are based on the scores in National entrance exams like CAT and GATE; whereas admissions to the undergraduate degrees are based on the merit scores of the candidates in the qualifying exam.The University offers a Bachelor’s programme in Aeronautical Engineering. Admission to the programme is based on the qualifying scores of the candidates in JEE Main followed by a personal interview round. Applications to admissions are available in both Online and Offline modes.The University holds a good placement record; companies like IDEA, INFOSYS, Airtel, Dabur etc. are some of the top recruiters in the placement drive at the campus. The institute also offers scholarships to the poor, needy as well as meritorious students as per the scholarship programmes by the government. Students have to apply for the scholarships at the starting of the academic session with the required documents.
faqs.question: Q: Is Swami Vivekanand University UGC approved?

faqs.answer: The admissions for Swami Vivekanand University have been going on, but the application form date has passed.The privately owned Swami Vivekananda University, popularly known as SVU, was established in 2019. Swami Vivekananda University is situated in Barrackpore, West Bengal. Public transit connects it to the main city extremely well. The university offers top-notch instruction in a range of subject areas.

The fee structure may change over time, so it's advisable to check the official website for further updates.

review_summary.college_name: Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Good college with excellent faculty.

content.Placements: No placement and no company ever visit for my course. The students have to do their internship by themselves, and no support is provided by the college. In course, the internship can be done with own money. I have done my internship from TTC Hisar with the amount of 10,000 rupees.
content.Infrastructure: The campus consists of huge buildings with different courses. There are 151 courses done by Swami Vivekanand University. It also has hostel facilities with separate hostel of boys and girls. Classrooms are very spacious and ventilated. Computer labs are high-tech.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement, good facilities and really good infrastructure .

content.Placements: Only 2 or 3 students from the whole batch were placed, with not-so-handsome packages, and no big giants' companies came to recruit the students. Internships are available if you want to arrange them on your own in pharmaceutical industries and hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The college is spread over approximately 65 acres with highly facilitated infrastructure. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well maintained on the campus. The hostel facilities are also well maintained, with good food available in the mess. Additionally, sports and games are conducted every year.

content.Placements: Enrolling in this private university ensures a secure career with excellent placement opportunities. Many local companies also provide internships for students, contributing to a well-rounded experience. The average package ranges from 3–4 LPA, with the highest reaching 7 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is modern, featuring contemporary building designs, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, computer labs with smart technology, and widespread Wi-Fi across the campus. The hostel is conveniently located near the institute building, and regular sports activities are organized.

admission_overview.title: Swami Vivekanand University Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Swami Vivekanand University admissions are done on both merit and entrance basis as per the course. For online process, apply through the offcial website. The university offers various UG, PG, Diploma and certificate level courses. These courses are offered across various fields Science, Pharmacy, Education, Law, Computer Applications, etc. Also known as SVN University Sagar, the university is located in Madhya Pradesh. Read the following article to learn all about the admission procedure, courses, and admission criteria of Swami Vivekanand University.

eligibility_selection.title: Swami Vivekanand University Eligibility & Selection Criteria 2026
eligibility_selection.description: Swami Vivekanand University course admission is subject to the fulfilment of preset admission criteria. Students wishing to enrol into the university need to make sure that they meet both the minimum educational qualifications and the selection criteria to get a seat. Admissions are primarily merit-based. The university may accept valid scores obtained in national or state-level entrance examinations. Further, students may have to participate in state-level counselling.

admission_process.title: Swami Vivekanand University Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Swami Vivekanand University's admission processinvolves application, selection, counselling (if applicable) and admission confirmation. Students need to satisfy the admission criteria to get admission into the university. The application process of the university commences online. Eligible students interested in applying can follow the s explained below to complete the admission process of Swami Vivekanand University.
Application and Registration
Log on to the official website and apply online by filling out the basic details.
Shortlisting Process

Students are mainly selected on a merit basis. However SVU Sagar may also consider entrance exam scores depending on the programme. Students need to provide scores obtained in the last qualifying examination. Exams such as CAT/ MAT can be taken into consideration for MBA admission. For certain courses students may have to participate in Gujarat counselling for seat allotment.
Merit List and Admission Confirmation
Once a seat is offered students need to report for document verification. After that paythe feesfor seat confirmation.

The total tuition fees for the university's courses can include components like tuition fees, library fees, and more. Some of the SVN University fees are charged only once during the time of admissions, while the remaining are to be paid as per the university's guidelines. faqs.answer: Yes, Swami Vivekanand University offers a Bachelor of Technology or BTech among other undegraduate courses. It is offered in the full-time mode through the university's Faculty of Engineering. The duration of the course is four years and it follows a semester pattern. faqs.question: Are admissions open in Swami Vivekanand University?
faqs.answer: The admissions for Swami Vivekanand University have been going on, but the application form date has passed.The privately owned Swami Vivekananda University, popularly known as SVU, was established in 2019. Swami Vivekananda University is situated in Barrackpore, West Bengal. Public transit connects it to the main city extremely well. The university offers top-notch instruction in a range of subject areas.

paragraphs: Swami Vivekanand University placement brochure or report has not been released. As per the Shiksha students' reviews, the average package in recent placements ranged between INR 4 LPA and INR 7 LPA . Every year around 70% of the batch gets successfully placed . Furthermore, the highest package offered in recent drives was INR 8 LPA . PhonePe, Adani Group, and Nike, among others were some of the leading companies that participated in Swami Vivekanand University placements over the past few years.

faqs.question: How are B.Tech placements at SVC - Swami Vivekanand University?
faqs.answer: Swami Vivekanand University (SVU) offers B.Tech placements with good opportunities for students. The university has a placement cell that facilitates the placement process. Many companies visit the university every year for placements. The university provides internships for students after the 2nd semester. The average salary package for B.Tech students is 3.5 Lacs per annum.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects of pursuing a BA at Swami Vivekanand University?
faqs.answer: Pursuing a BA at Swami Vivekanand University can lead to varied career prospects depending on the specialisations chosen by the candidates. The university provides various specialisations and subject combinations under its BA course. Generally, a BA graduate can build a career management, media, tourism, hospitality, etc. They are also eligible to appear for competitve exams leading to government jobs. Graduates planning for higher education can go for courses like MA, MBA , etc.

faqs.answer: Swami Vivekanand University offers three-year BA in various specialisations. The university also offers a three-year BA (Hons). The tuition fees for these courses vary from one another. hostel_campus.college_name: Swami Vivekanand University Sagar Infrastructure Details & Reviews

facilities: Academic Facilities: Well-equipped classrooms, laboratories, libraries, and computer centers to support academic learning and research activities.
Hostel Accommodation: On-campus hostel facilities for students, especially those coming from different cities or states.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with excellent faculty.
reviews.review_text: The campus consists of huge buildings with different courses. There are 151 courses done by Swami Vivekanand University. It also has hostel facilities with separate hostel of boys and girls. Classrooms are very spacious and ventilated. Computer labs are high-tech.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of placement, good facilities and really good infrastructure .
reviews.review_text: The college is spread over approximately 65 acres with highly facilitated infrastructure. Labs, classrooms, and the library are well maintained on the campus. The hostel facilities are also well maintained, with good food available in the mess. Additionally, sports and games are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: SVN University Sagar MBA Review.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is modern, featuring contemporary building designs, smart classrooms, well-equipped labs, computer labs with smart technology, and widespread Wi-Fi across the campus. The hostel is conveniently located near the institute building, and regular sports activities are organized.

reviews.review_heading: SVN has a nice campus and placement service.
reviews.review_text: It is a modern-type institution with the best facilities and a large campus for all course students. Classrooms are highly facilitated and well designed. Wi-fi services are open to everyone around campus. The canteen is close to the institute, and the food is excellent. Sports activities are held every weekend.

reviews.review_heading: Swami Vivekanand Vishwavidyalaya review.
reviews.review_text: This university has a modern, advanced-designed infrastructure, well-furnished classrooms, and an A.C. cabin for officials only, a fully-stocked library, and labs for other practical works. Here is a hostel outside of the city with a nice mess and good food quality; the canteen food is very tasty and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is large with modern facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides modern infrastructure. The campus is well-designed. We have a library, a canteen, high technology classrooms, digital screens, Wi-Fi, etc. The hostel is good. It is near our college. It provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: SVN SAGAR campus life experience.
reviews.review_text: SVN provides a better experience on campus. The campus grounds are large and include a sports activity facility. The classroom is fully clean and equipped with an air conditioning facility. The hostel capacity at SVN is a maximum of 200 students. In a hostel, there is a bed, a fan in the rooms, 24*7 electricity, and no shortage of places in the hostel or compound. So the overall average development in the SVN Institute that students expect is good.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: In this college, the hostel provides no such facility. It provides ground for playing, and teachers were helpful. The classrooms were fine, and the library was also good. The food quality was not better. It also provides medical facilities. Sports and tournaments were held in this college.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college and I'm very much satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities provided by the college are quite good and helpful for students. Faculty members are willing to offer help. The hostels are average if we compare them to some private colleges, but are above average if compared to the college of the same city. A library facility is provided to students.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities. It provides good practice of field & practical knowledge
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the University is very good. Classrooms and labs are very clean. Large hall for programme, playground. For agriculture course, field practice is also available. Wi-fi facility also available in university. But currently, there is no hostel facility for students. Student can live in nearby colonies on rent.

reviews.review_heading: The college is shaping future engineers.
reviews.review_text: Swami Vivekananda university is big and awesome. It has the perfect environment and atmosphere which suits the college or university. It has huge labs for the different and separate sections of education. The university has an attractive look at the front and also at the intermediate, there is the big and large playground in the front of the university. Mainly, the university is located on a hill.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, quality of education, discipline.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. It is situated in a big area. The labs are also there, and they also take us to the other places for the practicals. The classroom is fully air-conditioned, and the medical and the library facilites are also there. They give a chance to attend different seminars, and we also get the chances to interact with the companies.

reviews.review_heading: Placement record is not good but teachers are very helpful
reviews.review_text: Labs, the classroom, the library and sports facilities are good. The canteen is very bad. There is no Wi-Fi when I am in the college. The quality of classrooms and labs is good. Also, there are good lab instruments. Lab attendants give us proper knowledge about the experiment. Hostel rooms are good. I didn't face any infrastructure-related issues in my college time. Medical facilities are good as well.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, I find the work and facilities at my college to be excellent.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is very comfortable and provides good performance, although I don't stay in the hostel. However, the hostel is in very good condition, feels comfortable, and the bedrooms are awesome. The study materials are great, and the owner is an excellent worker. I hope the hostel maintains very good conditions, and the kitchen offers sweet food, served hot.

reviews.review_heading: Good campus with best faculty members.
reviews.review_text: There is not any hostel or Wi-Fi facility in the college, as it is not even required because all the students are from the local city. But yes, if we talk about sports and games, then there is huge scope; they support all the curricular activities and once a year, a sports meet is also conducted for students.

reviews_list.review_title: Good college if the focus is on good academics but college life is average.

review_content.Placements: From the passing out batch 120 among 200 got placed by on campus placements. The highest package was 12 LPA by Mitsogo. individual_reviews.title: This college is good for academics in 2026.

content.Placements: For placements, one of the best in Kerala. Top companies like IBM, TCS, L&T, and HRL visit our campus. Placements are higher for Computer Science allied courses. Last year, an average of 2 placement offers were made per student. The average package was 4-5 LPA, and the highest was 12 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of MITS is not that great. The infrastructure of the second block MITS is kind of poor, a poor building with congested classes. I am not a hostel student, but as my friends are there, they said the mess is decent, and the facilities are okay for them. I am a day scholar. I go to college by the college bus facility. We have a pretty good canteen and cafes to chill.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average college life, events, and fest are too less, and the placement is above average.

content.Placements: 70% of students are placed in the Electronics and Communication Engineering department. TCS, LEKTIK, CAVLII, etc., are the recruiting companies. Students secured internships at Kerala Digital, IITs, NITs, etc. The highest package offered to ECE students at Muthoot Institute of Technology and Science (MITS) is around 45 LPA, while the lowest package is around 6 LPA, and the median package is approximately 3.75 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The department provides excellent infrastructure to support learning and practical applications. The classrooms are equipped with projectors for interactive sessions. The library is well-stocked with books. The hostel facilities are average, and the mess provides average food.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good college if the focus is on good academics but college life is average.

content.Placements: From the passing out batch 120 among 200 got placed by on campus placements. The highest package was 12 LPA by Mitsogo. Top recruiting companies are TCS, IBM, and UST Global. Many got pre-placement offer internships from IBM. The top roles are software developers and testers.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is nice and the college focuses on academics more. The hostel is also good. The food is nice much better than in any other hostel. They serve nonveg and veg and the menu is according to the student's suggestion which changes every month.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good placement and faculty members.

content.Placements: I'm a student of the electronics and communication engineering branch. The highest package was about 9 LPA and about 80% of students were placed Top companies like Amazon, EY, and Cognizant visit our college I would say this is a good college that focuses on studies.
content.Infrastructure: We have a not-so-big campus. We have almost all the facilities like Wi-Fi, canteens, cafe, etc. Our hostel is located about 200 meters away from the campus. Hostel facilities are also average and it is well-maintained. Hostel managers always monitor the students.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best college if you are a studious person.

content.Placements: Placements are not an issue if you have cleared all the papers. All prominent companies like TCS, Wipro, IBM, EY, etc., are the companies that offer placements for computer science students. Some extraordinary salary packages are also offered for talented students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really good and is well-promising. All facilities like boys hostel, girls hostel, free Wi-Fi are provided. Students interested in sports can also make maximum advantage of college since they have all kinds of facilities and mentors for all activities.

hostel_campus.college_name: Muthoot Institute of Technology and Science Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Both hostels have well-furnished and spacious room with most modern amenities. Both hostels are controlled by wardens.Each student will be provided a cot, a cupboard, a table and a chair in their respective rooms. The hostel also provides parking facilities along with a hygienic dining area, lobby, gym, a prayer hall, internet facilities and 24*7 power supply.

library.description: The college library also known as Tagore library is a two floor building. It has a rich collection of books, scientific and technical journals and electronic reference materials.The total collection of books is around 14000+ physical collections including 1500 reference titles. A rich collection of general titles consists of books on soft skill, fiction collection and competitive examinations attracts voracious readers to Library.It has subscribed to 60+ technical magazines and journals which are peer reviewed, published by professional bodies. It has more than 1500 DVD collections.Library provides place for academic discussions, group discussions, tutorials etc. through study zones namely orange and green zones. Library provides printing and photocopying facility.DSpace Institutional Repositoryis a digital library provided by the college.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for academics in 2026.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of MITS is not that great. The infrastructure of the second block MITS is kind of poor, a poor building with congested classes. I am not a hostel student, but as my friends are there, they said the mess is decent, and the facilities are okay for them. I am a day scholar. I go to college by the college bus facility. We have a pretty good canteen and cafes to chill.

reviews.review_heading: Average college life, events, and fest are too less, and the placement is above average.
reviews.review_text: The department provides excellent infrastructure to support learning and practical applications. The classrooms are equipped with projectors for interactive sessions. The library is well-stocked with books. The hostel facilities are average, and the mess provides average food.

reviews.review_heading: Good college if the focus is on good academics but college life is average.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is nice and the college focuses on academics more. The hostel is also good. The food is nice much better than in any other hostel. They serve nonveg and veg and the menu is according to the student's suggestion which changes every month.

reviews.review_heading: Good placement and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: We have a not-so-big campus. We have almost all the facilities like Wi-Fi, canteens, cafe, etc. Our hostel is located about 200 meters away from the campus. Hostel facilities are also average and it is well-maintained. Hostel managers always monitor the students.

reviews.review_heading: Best college if you are a studious person.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really good and is well-promising. All facilities like boys hostel, girls hostel, free Wi-Fi are provided. Students interested in sports can also make maximum advantage of college since they have all kinds of facilities and mentors for all activities.

reviews.review_heading: I like my college but not in the case of programs.
reviews.review_text: There are many kinds of infrastructure in my department. All the equipment is well-maintained and is of good quality. The hostel provides mineral water for all students as they want. It also has good quality food and a good atmosphere. The college has good infrastructure with well-maintained classrooms and a hostel. The college has many labs with air-conditioning and Wi-Fi facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with overall.
reviews.review_text: Modern classrooms, advanced laboratories, well-equipped computer labs, and a vast library are there for academic excellence. The hostel facilities include separate accommodation for boys and girls. There are furnished rooms, Wi-Fi, a mess, 24/7 security and recreational areas for a comfortable stay.

reviews.review_heading: A great college for academics.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a wide range of facilities. It has 9-12 computer labs. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. The library has a wide range of books according to the curriculum. The lab facility is also available here. There are 2 cafes and a main canteen. Our college has a very active cricket, football, basketball, and volleyball team. There is also an active participation in badminton. The hostel is also decent. There are separate hostels for boys and girls named Adams House for boys and Even House for ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Muthoot Institute of Technology and Science.
reviews.review_text: The overall infrastructure is quite good compared to other colleges in the state. Our college has clubs that support students throughout our college life. They provide great support for sports. They hire trainees and send students to various competitions. Hostel rooms are very good, and hostelers are provided with basic amenities like a gym, a badminton court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: College has good faculty. Programmes are very rare and more like a school life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of both the hostel and the college is average. The campus is not that big. However, the facilities are great, with well-equipped machines and equipment. The hostel is good and well-maintained, and the food is edible, as you would expect from hostel food.

reviews.review_heading: An average college but good for studies.
reviews.review_text: Campus provides a good library which is very useful even for studying. All amenities are provided in both boys' and girls' hostels, but the boys' hostel is small. There are amenities like a gym, tennis court, lift, and cleaning service. The college provides good support for sports and sends students to different colleges for competitions. The college is not that spacious, so it's difficult to conduct a big event. There is a big spacious canteen which provides average food items.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome campus and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college plays a vital role in the development of the college as the students are now focusing on labs, classrooms, etc. Wi-Fi, labs, classroom and libraries are also available. All facilities are best here.

reviews.review_heading: Academically good college with great faculty members and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is pretty good. There are many facilities for the students to utilize. There are two academic blocks on the campus. One is newer than the other, and that's the one given to the first years to avoid ragging. That block consists of the office and the administration wing, which is there for you to clear your doubts. Well-maintained classrooms are provided to the students with great ventilation. The hostel is also well-maintained, but the only downside is the hostel...

reviews.review_heading: Second-best college in Kerala and first among other private colleges.
reviews.review_text: Since its a new college compared to others, the infrastructure, which is now there, is above average, but many construction works are going on for new buildings and hostels. Both men's and ladies hostels are very good with all the facilities, including 5G Wi-Fi. Sports facilities are also very good and we've got some of the best basketball and volleyball teams in the state. Many players get selected for the university team as well. Football grounds, indoor badminton courts, and gyms are also pro...

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty makes a good future.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are the best in quality. The infrastructure of my college is good. For this department, the college offers facilities including classrooms, library, playground, canteen, transportation, hostels, mess, labs, sports and games being conducted at state levels. Food available in the canteen, mess and the hostels is good.

individual_reviews.title: Great college with nice faculty.

content.Placements: The placement rate is 100%. The highest package is 10 LPA, the lowest package is 2-3 LPA, and the average package is 4 LPA. Companies like Infosys, Capgemini, TCS, Wipro, GenC, and many startups recruit students. Around 60% of students get internships, mostly in IT jobs, such as Software Engineer and Associate Software Engineer.
content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi here, and labs are very clean. The classrooms are also very clean, and the library is very peaceful. The food quality in the canteen is very good, and the food is very hygenic.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the amount of fees and the services given by the college.

content.Placements: Placements are good here. If we study then definitely there is ample chance. I'm in the first year so I don't know much about which role they hire or what but companies do come to our campus for placements. It offers great jobs and takes a good amount of students.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good in our college but the hostel is the worse than living. It is not a hostel but a total mess, so we can't survive there. Sometimes, we will get baby cockroaches in vegetables or an insect. This is not a hostel it's just a flat that they have created.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Fees are relatively less, so it is value for money for the degree, and placements are average

content.Placements: It shows that around 70% of students are placed, and placements are still going on. Companies like Cognizant, Infosys, Accenture, and many more come for placement. Some students get a chance for higher studies abroad, and some get internships.
content.Infrastructure: Labs and classrooms are good. We have projectors in every classroom, which help during lectures and PPT presentations. We have CCTV in classrooms, and we have Wi-Fi on the campus. In the computer labs, machines are in good condition. We have AC in all labs.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is good, the faculty is helpful, and overall good.

content.Placements: The placement is not sufficient for everyone. More companies and more institutes are needed. Not all companies give a satisfactory salary so it's quite disappointing sometimes. The average package is 2.5 LPA to 3 LPA. Not everyone gets a job. Sometimes it's depressing.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers well equipped labs modern classrooms libraries and WiFi. Hostels provide clean rooms food and security. Facilities vary by course, with industry-standard equipment for practical learning. But I don’t stay in the hostel so I don’t know details.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am disappointed after taking admission here. Campus life and playgrounds are missing.

content.Placements: In my course, about 70-80% of students get placed. The highest salary package offered is 10 LPA and the lowest salary package offered is 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies like TCS visit the college for placements. Internship facilities are so poor so I do not know about it. Top roles like data science and development are offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and the infrastructure available for our course are 3 buildings with 7th floors. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are available for educational purposes only. The quality of the hostel is very poor. It is so far from the college, which is 3 kilometers away. There is no good canteen. In the canteen, no one is able to eat food by sitting because no sitting facility is available. The canteen food taste is very poor, and the canteen staff members are rude.

admission_process.title: BP Poddar Institute Kolkata Admission process 2025

paragraphs: BP Poddar Institute Kolkata admissioncriteria for all courses is entrance-based. The institute offers UG and PG courses in the stream of Technology and Management, which are offered in affiliation with theMaulana Abul Kalam Azad University of Technology.BPPIMTaccepts state-level and national-level entrance exams to shortlist candidates for final admission. Those who qualify for the entrance examination can then register on theBP Poddar Institute Kolkataregistration portal for seat allocation. Read on to know more aboutBP Poddar Institute of Management and Technology admission 2025:
BP Poddar Institute offers UG and PG courses in the disciplines of Technology and Management. Check below the key highlights for BPPIMT admission:
Particulars
BP Poddar Institute Kolkata Admission 2025 Highlights
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG & PG courses
How to apply?
https://www.bppimt.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

Candidates interested in getting intoBP Poddar Institute Kolkata coursesare required to follow the MAKAUT CET,WBJEE, JEE Main and WBUT PGETexam and BPPIMT application process. After the same, the University allots seats to the students. Check out the following table for details onBPPIMT course admission,which is inclusive of its eligibility & selection:

BP Poddar Institute Kolkata conducts various rounds for shortlisting candidates for courses. Admission to BP Poddar Institute of Management and Technology is a multi-step process. Check below the step-wiseBP Poddar Institute of Management and Technology admission process:
Step 1: BP Poddar Institute Kolkata Application Process 2025

To get the application login credentials, candidates must submit the registration fee through the official website of BP Poddar Institute of Management and Technology. Candidates need to apply online on the official website of the university.
Step 2: BP Poddar Institute Kolkata Selection Process 2025

Admission to BPPIMT courses is entrance-based. The institute has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. BPPIMT accepts valid scores of various state-level and national-level entrance exams. The selection process includes an entrance exam, shortlisting of candidates & final admission.
Step 3: BP Poddar Institute Kolkata Counselling & Admission Confirmation

After completion of the selection rounds, candidates are required to visit the college for counselling and document verification. Selected candidates need to payBP Poddar Institute Kolkata course feeto confirm their admission.

hostel_campus.college_name: BP Poddar Institute of Management and Technology Poddar Vihar Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Great college with nice faculty.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi here, and labs are very clean. The classrooms are also very clean, and the library is very peaceful. The food quality in the canteen is very good, and the food is very hygenic.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the amount of fees and the services given by the college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good in our college but the hostel is the worse than living. It is not a hostel but a total mess, so we can't survive there. Sometimes, we will get baby cockroaches in vegetables or an insect. This is not a hostel it's just a flat that they have created.

reviews.review_heading: Fees are relatively less, so it is value for money for the degree, and placements are average
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are good. We have projectors in every classroom, which help during lectures and PPT presentations. We have CCTV in classrooms, and we have Wi-Fi on the campus. In the computer labs, machines are in good condition. We have AC in all labs.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, the faculty is helpful, and overall good.
reviews.review_text: The college offers well equipped labs modern classrooms libraries and WiFi. Hostels provide clean rooms food and security. Facilities vary by course, with industry-standard equipment for practical learning. But I don’t stay in the hostel so I don’t know details.

reviews.review_heading: I am disappointed after taking admission here. Campus life and playgrounds are missing.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and the infrastructure available for our course are 3 buildings with 7th floors. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and a library are available for educational purposes only. The quality of the hostel is very poor. It is so far from the college, which is 3 kilometers away. There is no good canteen. In the canteen, no one is able to eat food by sitting because no sitting facility is available. The canteen food taste is very poor, and the canteen staff members are rude.

reviews.review_heading: All about my college life.
reviews.review_text: In our college, there is Wi-Fi on the campus. There is a common room and labs for electrical, mechanical, and IT. The hostel of the college is not on the campus but it is provided by the college itself. The distance between the hostel and the college is around 10 minutes walking distance. Wi-Fi is also there in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of B.P. Poddar Institute of Management and Technology, Poddar Vihar.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers four branches: Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics and Communication Engineering and Electrical Engineering. There are separate labs for each department. Wi-Fi facility is available on the college campus and all the students can access it. Hostel is also provided by the college; the hostel offered three sharing rooms with attached bathrooms & a common bathroom. There were water filters on each floor of the hostel, one common fridge, and food quality is averag...

reviews.review_heading: Decent academics and placements, supportive faculty and alumni and active sports teams.
reviews.review_text: The CSE department at B. P. Poddar College offers basic classrooms, computer labs, and a library. Hostel conditions are poor, and mess food quality often leads to complaints. While cricket and football teams exist, lack of institutional support limits participation in inter-college tournaments. Only some faculty and alumni actively encourage players.

reviews.review_heading: BP Poddar would be a great choice if your WBJEE rank is around 8k to 20k.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not so good if you compare it with top colleges, but yes, it's fine. It has auditoriums and indoor rooms to play. But it doesn't have a football field. They organize football tournaments, which is one of the biggest and craziest things in this college, and you will love it.

reviews.review_heading: We received a deeper understanding of all the topics mentioned in the textbooks.
reviews.review_text: The names of the annual technical festivals of my college are Techstorm and Elixir. They are held in the months of March and April every year. The accessibility to books and journals is limited to students. There are no sports or events held in the college as the campus has very limited space.

reviews.review_heading: It provides proper knowledge at an affordable cost.
reviews.review_text: Our college has good facilities and infrastructure. It provides high-speed internet and updated machines. Hostels ambiance is very nice. Tight security and good quality food are served. Medical facilities are available and college plays a huge role in sports and games. They arrange annual sports for games like cricket, football and throwball.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: Classroom infrastructure is good. We have projectors in every class. The lab is very good, and we have Macs in some labs. Library has all the important books for every subject, including GATE question books. Hostel and mess food is average, but canteen food is amazing.

reviews.review_heading: I am almost satisfied with college life and experience with faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Overall, it is a good college. infrastructure is good according to the fee they charge. Hostel needs improvement. Labs are all good and air-conditioned. Classrooms are good, with good ventilation and plenty of air.

reviews.review_heading: This college is very good.
reviews.review_text: We have Wi-Fi available in every classroom. Labs are average and sometimes the equipment is insufficient. The library is good and very peaceful, but students cannot always issue books, and not all books are accessible. Only course-related books are allowed, and even those are not always available. This is a disadvantage of the library.

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with faculty members, canteen food, and placements in 2021. College is located in a pr
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite good but not too much.  Facilities available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are good and useful in many things. Hostel facility is not good, though some of my fellow friends stay there. Since the college is located in a prime area, the hostel does not run properly.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I am almost satisfied with the college. Really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 75% of students are getting placed. If you are skilled, then the college will support you to the maximum, and they will provide opportunities for 100%. Placement coordinators are encouraging and providing training with utmost sincerity and seriousness. Top recruiters are TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, etc. About 50% of students are getting internship opportunities. Top roles offered include software engineer, full-stack developer, etc. The highest package is above 10 LPA, and average is 6 LPA - 7 LPA. The lowest salary will be about 3 LPA - 4 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: College is providing good infrastructure and facilities. Classrooms are well maintained and furnished, and all classrooms as well as lab are under camera surveillance. They provide a good Wi-Fi connection. I am a hosteler, and it is also maintained properly. Food quality is also okay. They have proper schedule as well as food menu and follow it properly.

The salary package here is four LPA.

There is also a playground, gym center, and free Wi-Fi on the campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: TIST Arakkunnam: An honest review from a fresher.

content.Placements: Placements are decent for CSE, IT, and Safety branches. Mass recruiters like TCS and Infosys offer an average of 3.5–4.5 LPA, though high packages can reach 12 LPA. The placement cell offers dedicated training for technical grounds, which is a huge advantage when trying to crack higher package offers.
content.Infrastructure: TIST has a green, open campus that offers a quiet place to study. The labs are well equipped, and the large library is a really useful resource for students. Overall, the infrastructure is practical and simple, making it a good spot to focus on coursework.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placements in the past couple of years in our college.

content.Placements: The average LPA that our CS branch has received during the past academic year has been around 6–6.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies for our course are Cognizant, Infosys, UST, and KarTech. Currently, the placement drive is still going on, and as of now, companies like UST, Infosys, and Cognizant have recruited a good number of students and have offered good packages.
content.Infrastructure: Overall, the infrastructure is satisfactory. Wi-Fi often seems to be slow, especially in the basement-level labs. Classrooms and libraries are well maintained. All necessary resources are provided in the library. Regarding sports, necessary training and coaching are provided for students in football, kho-kho, etc., for both boys and girls. The food in the canteen is healthy, budget-friendly, and satisfactory.

reviews.review_heading: It offers excellent education with practical exposure.
reviews.review_text: The college offers state of the art facilities including well equipped labs spacious classrooms a comprehensive library and high speed Wi Fi connectivity. The hostel provides comfortable rooms a mess a canteen and a medical center. Sports enthusiasts can enjoy indoor and outdoor games a gym and an auditorium. Additional amenities include a cafeteria and transportation facilities ensuring a comfortable and convenient learning experience.

reviews.review_heading: TIST provides crucial four years of your life.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are decent but labs of safety and fire engineering department is better than the same in CUSAT and it offers industrial level exposure and gives very much knowledge and fests, sports and cultural events are provided and it is better than other private engineering colleges.

reviews.review_heading: Toc H - Good for its academics but disappoints with the campus life and extracurricular activities.
reviews.review_text: Labs and library are pretty above average and have all the necessary facilities and staff. Classrooms are average when we look at cleanliness and facilities. Wi-Fi facilities are rarely available, that too only if we are working on specific projects that are given by the college faculty members.

reviews.review_heading: The college is pretty good overall with better placements and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is pretty good with good food. Both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options are available. There are 2 people in each room. There are also 3 people in a room. It is a quiet space and has an almirah with mirrors. There are also study halls in the hostel. There are 2 boys hostels and 1 girls hostel. Free Wi-Fi is available in this college. Classrooms are also good with fans, powerpoint, and green boards. Labs are air-conditioned with free Wi-Fi. There is a main library and department-wise lib...

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college for an MBA in India.
reviews.review_text: Every block has Wi-Fi. However, the issue is that they all are extremely slow and therefore unusable. All labs include air-conditioners, well-maintained systems, and high-quality computers that operate flawlessly. Classrooms are of mediocre quality, but some students may get dust allergies due to the dust boards. There are no air-conditioners in the classrooms. Libraries are excellent, and they have a digital system that makes using them very easy.

reviews.review_heading: Good placements in 2023, good infrastructure and many more to know about Tist.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms are occupied with digital screens and projectors. There are plenty of labs for every department. There are department wise library as well as central digital library. The hostel is pretty good for girls and boys. The food is also very good in canteen as well as in the hostel mess.

reviews.review_heading: Know more about Toc H Institute of Science & Technology.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure facilities are very good, consisting of high-facilities classrooms, libraries, etc. The college provides hostels for both boys and girls on campus. Hostel mess provides nutritious food, which includes both vegetarian and non-vegetarian food. The college has canteen, a hospital for medical facilities and stadium for sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Awesome faculty and good placement training sessions.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. All classes have either a projector or television. The lab facilities are also good. There is a canteen inside the college that provides breakfast and lunch. There are also small convenience stores that provide both snacks and stationery.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the infrastructure, faculty, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities provided by the college were satisfactory. The college provided top-notch infrastructure to the students. The labs were equipped with very good-quality systems. In case of any malfunctioning or out-of-order equipment, they were immediately fixed or replaced.

reviews.review_heading: One of the best choices for the best education.
reviews.review_text: The college has great infrastructure with high-quality classrooms, labs, etc. Libraries, being a gateway to knowledge, are arranged in the most efficient way. Not to mention the other facilities like the hostel, canteen, health clinic, etc. Everything is well-arranged and highly maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Great college, fun people to be around, events that last a lifetime.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good. Top-notch labs and facilities for whoever requires them. Wi-Fi is decent in speed. review_content.Placements: Placements in this college are okay. People get selected in companies like TCS, Infosys, and other companies. The pay scale is about 1 LPA - 2 LPA. individual_reviews.title: Faculty is good. Good infrastructure.

content.Placements: Around 30 to 50 % students were placed through our college. The highest package was around 22 LPA, and the lowest was 3 LPA. Companies like Infosys, Capgemini, Cognizant, and TCS were some of the top recruiters. 60% of the students got an internship. Web developer, support engineer, and software developer roles are offered. 60% of the students got internships in companies like BigO Software, TCS, Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is actually very good, the classrooms are also good, our college also has a big library, and the labs are also well-maintained. Our college also conducts sports and games every year, where every student from each batch participates and competes.

reviews.review_text: Mess food is awesome good quantity and quality food available at cheaper rates. You don't get to eat the same things you get a variety and good food. Hostels are not up to that mark like that of home but they are good for an engineering college student. Good net facilities are available. Sports equipment and ground are near from hostel. Also, the hostel has 24 hour water and electricity supply.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied because of its faculty members and principal of our college.
reviews.review_text: The campus has big infrastructure. There are various labs for students to perform and complete the practicals or projects. Labs have Wi-Fi with fully access to search various types of projects. College has a big library to read books or for study also and has classrooms for lectures. The quality of the hostel is excellent. Mess food is very good as compared to other colleges. There are all kinds of sports organized by the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good. Having experienced teachers, good campus, and average package is 4 LPA.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good having a library for students in college. We also have Wi-Fi-enabled labs and library. In the hostel, there is very good environment. We have Wi-Fi and water for drinking. There is a clean canteen for food. There is also a ground for playing football and other sports.

reviews.review_heading: College review of PDEA College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is good. The buildings are clean and a very neat environment for students to study. We have several sports on campus. We can play sports by using our IDs. There is even one subject for the sports. Everything seems okay with the infrastructure. There are two hostels available for girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Review of PDEA College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: There is the least number of equipment in the sports room. There is no good equipment in the arts club. The food provided by the canteen is not good for health case they do not use more number of ingredients in cooking.

reviews.review_heading: PDEA College of Engineering, Pune Review.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of this college is good. The buildings are clean and a very neat environment for students to study. We have several sports on campus. We can play sports by using our IDs. There is even one subject for the sports. Everything seems okay with the infrastructure. There are two hostels available for girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and teaching.
reviews.review_text: There are Wi-Fi connections in every lab for students' purposes. If you have some work-related, you can do it in those labs. The canteen is also good. It provides tasty food. Sports is all about fun. There are medical facilities too. They also organise games like bike races.

reviews_list.review_title: In our college, the faculty is good.

review_content.Placements: I am in mechanical engineering, and there are a total of 17 students in the batch of 2021. The demand for mechanical engineering nowadays is high because all students are going into computer engineering, and the seats are filling up. In our mechanical department, attendance is compulsory in lectures.
review_content.Infrastructure: In our college library, they are strictly checking IDs to get entry, and the lab of the computer department is designed very nicely. The structure of the computer department is also the best. In our college canteen, there is often a lack of seating during break time because it gets crowded.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and well-qualified faculty in the CSE course.

review_content.Placements: Students were getting good placement opportunities at this college. At this college, every year around 30 to 40% of the CSE graduates get placed. The average package offered in this college was between 3-4 LPA. Top recruiters at the college were IT companies like Infosys, Wipro, Mira, UBON, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for this CSE course at this institution were above average. Students were getting computer labs for programming and coding practice. Necessary facilities like Wi-Fi, library, canteen, sports, medical, etc., were available on the college campus. All these facilities were properly managed by the college management. Hostel facilities were also available for the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: S. S Jondhale College of Engineering in Dombivali is a great college.

review_content.Placements: About 60-70% of students get successfully placed in big companies. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA to 20 LPA and the lowest salary package is offered through our B.Tech in civil engineering course. The top recruiting companies are NBCC, RITES, and Construction. About 70% of students get internships through our course. There are all types of big roles offered through our course like construction, manager, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: All facilities are available in our college. A well-stocked library, well-maintained classrooms, Wi-Fi, digital classrooms, and all facilities are available in our college. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is just awesome. Food quality in mess or canteen is great. Medical facilities is also available. Sports and games are also available in our engineering college.

reviews.review_text: All facilities are available in our college. A well-stocked library, well-maintained classrooms, Wi-Fi, digital classrooms, and all facilities are available in our college. The quality of the facilities in the hostel is just awesome. Food quality in mess or canteen is great. Medical facilities is also available. Sports and games are also available in our engineering college.

reviews.review_heading: There are no placements, and the college is not value for money.
reviews.review_text: The college has labs, classrooms, and also a library with useful books and other books of all genres. The classrooms are very big, spacious and tidy enough.

reviews.review_heading: It's good if you attend the college regularly and don't depend on placement.
reviews.review_text: The college is still in a developing and constructing stage. There is no Wi-Fi in our college. Neither there are air-conditioners. The classrooms are somewhat old. The canteen is okay and I would rate it with 2 out of 5. The food served is good. We have good labs and a library. Sports facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: It is good, and there may not be any placements, but they train you for higher education.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available all over the college. I am not sure because we are pursuing education in the online mode. But the campus is huge. For every department, there is a different building. No hostel is available in our college. We can only travel and pursue our education. Sports and games might be available, I am not sure.

reviews.review_heading: Most regretful decision I ever made.
reviews.review_text:
We have wired connection in all classroom for laptops,  food quality is also good, sports and cultural fests is also arranged regularly and are good. Medical facilities are not good and also drinking water tanks were empty most of the times
.

reviews.review_heading: I am dissatisfied with the placements. It offers good placements for other departments.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a huge library. The college does not provide a hostel facility. Classrooms in the college are huge. The building of the college is quite old but new constructed building is in a ready position. The college basically is connected with 3 buildings and 1 is newly constructed. Each department has its own floor and building in that building, and they have their own labs. The mechanical department has its own huge building, which consists of a machine lab and testing lab. The college h...

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure is really good also the sports and other activities are great.
reviews.review_text: The facilities, infrastructure is just superb. There are amazing labs alloted for each subject practicals of each branch differently. The maintainence and overall cleanliness, hygiene is great. Canteen food and seating area is also neat and decent. There is a gym area available as well. Also the library is where students spend most of their time as it has uncountable number of books and it's equipped with AC. So all in all a great infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: You will have a below-average college life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college never disappoints you. The building is very well placed with grounds from all sides. Our college has 3 wings, and each of them sprawled over 3 floors. There is a separate building for the workshop. Classrooms are very spacious and have good exposure to lighting. Libraries and labs are maintained clean. Moreover, you never have to worry about the parking. There is a good space in the library which you need.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Shivajirao S. Jondhale College of Engineering (SSJCOE).
reviews.review_text: Our college has a football court, cricket pitch, kabbadi ground, etc. It also has a well-equipped gym, indoor games and Wi-Fi. The canteen is also good and clean with reasonable rates and tasty food. Infrastructure is good and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Very nice college for students who do job and also studies at a time.
reviews.review_text:
1. The facilities includes free Wi-Fi, drinking water facility, department library, computer labs, experimental laboratory. The college has good infrastructure with big classrooms. The classroom also has projectors for better e learning. 
2. The college has no hostel facility. The food quality of canteen was average and one can have different varieties of food available. The college has its own medical room, first aid kit. The college has its ground for carrying out sports and every they organiz...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good at everything else except in placements.
reviews.review_text: Our EXTC department had six well-equipped laboratories, including the project lab. The labs, as well as the library, were well maintained. The library contains plenty of books for a variety of subjects for the students. The department regularly organised seminars and workshops which were beneficial for the students. The food served in the canteen was very good.

reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure and sports facilities .

review_content.Placements: The college provides average placements. The average placement the college provides is 3.5 LPA. Before entering fourth year college, students are industry-ready for jobs. The college conducts placement training sessions for students. This session helps students build skills.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has very good infrastructure. There are no hostel facilities provided by the college. The college provides scholarships for the top 3 rankers in each academic year. Canteen facilities are decent. For sports, there is a sport event called 'Xavion' organized and managed by the Student Council.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Information Technology - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: There is very good infrastructure as well as 2-3 separate grounds and canteen.

review_content.Placements: In my course, almost 80% students get a placement. The common rule is that if you have skills, you will definitely get a job from this institute. Last year, the highest package was around 15 LPA, average package was that most of the students got 5–6 LPA, and the lowest package was 3.5 LPA. The top companies are Ugam solutions, Areas, Business, Code Arrangement, etc. Most of the students get an offline internship in many companies like Sahu technologies, Amazon, etc. And online internships on EdSkill, the university-approved platform. There are many different roles available, including data analyst and developer.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Decent college in Thane.

review_content.Placements: I'm not passed out yet, but I heard from a senior that it's decent. There are many workshops and clubs in college which also help you with further studies after the degree. The highest placement by the college is 7 LPA, and it's good, I feel, for a beginner after completing the college.
review_content.Infrastructure: I won't say that the infrastructure is A+, but it is good; everything required in an engineering college is available. There is no hostel provided by the college, but there are many hostels near the college which are also used by students who live far from college.

individual_reviews.title: Little disappointed but it's good for completing the course.

content.Placements: Our college recently received an A+ rating by NAAC, and our placements have also improved. Recently, the highest package was around 7.5 LPA, and many students got placements above 3 LPA. The lowest package was around 2.5 LPA. Our college provides internships, too.

The range of package student got for college was the highest package (15LPA), the average (6LPA), and the lowest (3.5LPA).
content.Infrastructure: The facilities and infrastructure available in our course/department are good, with Wi-Fi, clear labs, classrooms, libraries, cricket turf and football fields. reviews.review_heading: Little disappointed but it's good for completing the course.
reviews.review_text: I haven't used the hostel as I live near the college. Regarding infrastructure, Wi-Fi is available. Classrooms are basic with fans, and some books are available in the library. However, we recently saw a snake in the canteen, which is not good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty and we have had good placement here for a long time.
reviews.review_text:
The facilities and infrastructure available in our course/department are good, with Wi-Fi, clear labs, classrooms, libraries, cricket turf and football fields. 
In terms of sports and games, we have both indoor and outdoor sports. 
Indoor sports like carrom, chess, table tennis and more are there.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and sports facilities .
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure. There are no hostel facilities provided by the college. The college provides scholarships for the top 3 rankers in each academic year. Canteen facilities are decent. For sports, there is a sport event called 'Xavion' organized and managed by the Student Council.

reviews.review_heading: There is very good infrastructure as well as 2-3 separate grounds and canteen.
reviews.review_text: We have a well-maintained library and labs with proper systems and books; we also have free Wi-Fi in our college for students; and proper physics and chemistry labs are there. We don't have hostel facilities but if you want, there are some hostels near our college. The food in the canteen is average; in our college, there is a separate medical room in case of an emergency; also, the college has a contact at a nearby hospital. In college, there is a student council committed to work under the mai...

reviews.review_heading: Decent college in Thane.
reviews.review_text: I won't say that the infrastructure is A+, but it is good; everything required in an engineering college is available. There is no hostel provided by the college, but there are many hostels near the college which are also used by students who live far from college.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities as of 2024.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available across all labs and libraries. The canteen doesn't offer a big menu, but all the options available are good, and the food is very clean. Labs are well-equipped with the required apparatus and computers with decent specifications, which are especially necessary for CSE.

reviews.review_heading: It's an above average College that provides value for money.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms, library, canteen, and labs are all equipped with better quality and comfort. Hostel facilities aren't provided, but everything else is better. The canteen provides good quality food. The gym and indoor playground are also available.

reviews.review_heading: You'll have a good time here!
reviews.review_text: The college absolutely does not have any air conditioning. It gets hot in the summers. Also there’s no network  available in the college. The classrooms are average. Mostly, it feels nice in the campus because of the nature surrounding the college. The canteen food is just average.

reviews.review_heading: Average college, placements are quite low and the teaching is good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure, classroom and library are average. Wi-Fi is available. The canteen is below average and contains okayish food, like normal food. There are many clubs in the college, like Rotaract, Student Council, NSS, etc., which conduct many events. Labs are well maintained.

reviews.review_heading: All in all college is good and also near station so easy to travel from thane east .
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is okay but the faculty of the college is friendly and helpful. There is no hostel of the college but rental houses are available near college in budget range. Every lab has a Wi-Fi in the college, and every department has a different floors, also library is available to study as well as read books from library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements for management and engineering students.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are good but are not comfortable. Wi-Fi is good. Library is big and consists of many academic books. Hostel facility is not available in our college so students need to find PG.

reviews.review_heading: Review of K.C.College of Engineering and Management Studies and Research.
reviews.review_text: This college has more than 50 classrooms with good-quality benches. Labs are well maintained. Every lab has an air-conditioner. There are so many network issues. It may be because the college is situated in a corner but the network facility is not good. The canteen has average food quality and an average number of dishes are available. There is no hostel facility so if you are one of those who are looking for hostel facilities, search for any PGs nearby. Sports and games competitions are held ev...

reviews.review_heading: Review of K.C.College of Engineering.
reviews.review_text: College surroundings are very silent and peaceful. College doesn't have a hostel. Wi-Fi is slow with a connectivity issue. Sometimes they give a lot of work and exam dates as a surprise. Canteen is decent but can have a bit of value food for students.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure, library, canteen, faculty members, placement cell, and locality are good.
reviews.review_text: The main problem with this college is a network issue. Network connectivity inside the college is very poor. Students have to go outside the college and then make a call. The infrastructure, including the library, classrooms, toilets, and canteen, is pretty good. There are no hostel facilities. If you are an outsider, you have to stay near the college. The college also has a number of activities conducted under several committees like E-CELL, NSS, and ROTARACT, which encourage students to take p...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: It has a well-maintained infrastructure with well-equipped labs and classrooms. The only problem faced by the students is network and internet problems. There is zero range on a college campus except in some areas. Rest all is fine.

overview_faqs.question: How is life at JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology?
overview_faqs.answer: PVPIT is governed by The Shetkari Shikshan Mandal, a charitable Trust registered under Bombay Public Trust Act 1950 and Societies Registration Act 1860.Academic environment and the overall campus life experience is really appreciable. Faculty teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable, which is very promising. The industry-focused curriculum is also a significant advantage. Furthermore, it have zero tolerance for ragging as well as JSPM-TSSM has taken all necessary steps to ensure the comfort of newcomers. The university aspires to build, cultivate, and maintain an environment of outstanding academic achievement, research, and entrepreneurship in order to prepare all aspiring students to address global concerns while keeping high ethical and moral standards through qualitative techniques.

The Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology (PVPIT) at JSPM-TSSM offers ten programmes with tuition ranging from Rs. 186,000 for the M.E. in Computer Engineering to Rs. 353,556 for the B.E. in Computer Engineering. Furthermore, B.Tech total tuition fees is 2.7L-3.5L while total tuition fees for pursuing M.Tech is 1.9L - 2.2L.
