admission_overview.college_name: PVPIT Pune Course Admissions 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Dates & Selection Process

admission_process.title: PVPIT Pune Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology (PVPIT Pune)admissions 2025 are open. The college offers admission to BTech, BCA and MTech programmes through a blend ofmerit and entrance-based admission processes. For PVPIT Pune admission to UG programmes, candidates need to qualify for eitherJEE or MHT CET exam. However, admission to PG course atTSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technologyis granted based on merit obtained in the final exam of BTech. Moreover, all the courses are offered in the affiliation withSavitribai Phule Pune University (SPPU). Later on, a common counselling process is also conducted for the final seat allotment. Read on more around PVPIT Pune admission in the article below.

All theUG and PG courses at PVPITare offered in the stream of Engineering across multiple specialisations. Candidates must fulfil the basic eligibility requirements to apply for their desired programme. Tabulated below are course-wise eligibility and selection criteria related to PVPIT course admissions 2025:
Download:PVPIT Admission Brochure 2024

JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology admissions are both merit and entrance-based. As per the admission criteria, candidates must register for the programme and then proceed with the other selection rounds. Check below the details steps for the PVPIT Pune admission process:
Step 1: Application Process

To apply for admission at PVPIT Pune, candidates must register on the official website of the accepted entrance exams in the first place. However, for direct admissions, candidates can fill an online enquiry for on the official website of PVPIT Pune with the relevant information.
Step 2: Selection Rounds

PVPIT admissions are both merit and entrance-based. For admission to BTech and BCA programme, candidates must qualify for either JEE Main, MHT CET and MAH CET for their respective courses. However, the institute offers direct admission based on candidates' merit obtained in the last qualifying exam of BTech.
Step 3: Release of Merit List
After the completion of all the selection rounds, the institute releases merit lists of the selected candidates. The lists are released in multiple rounds as per the requirements.
Step 4: Counselling Process
At last, the selected students are offered seats through a common counselling process. Next, candidates are required to pay a course fee to confirm their admission.

faqs.question: Can I join PVPIT Pune directly?

faqs.question: How to get direct admission at JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: The Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology at JSPM - TSSM is highly recognised for its M.E./M.Tech and B.E./B.Tech programmes. It is located in Pune, Maharashtra.It has established a strong reputation in a variety of engineering specialties, including mechanical engineering, civil engineering, electronics engineering, computer Science engineering, VLSI design, and construction engineering.There is no provision of direct admission for UG courses in PVPIT. An aspirant need to qualify for JEE Main/ MHT CET with scoring minimum 50% aggrgregate in Class board examinations in Science Stream for BTech and MAH CET for BCA. However, admission to MTech is done based on the merit of the last qualifying exam graduation.

paragraphs: As per the official website, the highest package package offered during placements in 2024 stood at INR 11 LPA. Earlier, the highest package and average package offered during placements in 2024 stood at INR 9 LPA and INR 3.31 LPA , respectively. The popular recruiters of JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology during placements 2023 were Intellipaat, Wisteria Real Vision, Silicus Technologies, etc.

faqs.question: Does PVPIT Pune have good placements?
faqs.answer: Yes, Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology Pune offeres good placements. According to the official website, the average package offered during placements 2023 was INR 4.2 LPA, while the highest package was INR 18 LPA. Furthermore, 81 out of 100 students were placed during JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology placements in 2023, and 1,500 recruiters visited the institute. Top recruiters such as Alentio Technologies, Jaro Education, Wiley, Byju's, and many more came for recruitment. Along with a good placement, the institute also provides training to students to get prepared for the interview. Soft Skills Training, Aptitude Training, Computer Programming Training, and others are opportunities are provided to the students.

faqs.question: What is the highest package of JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology for B.E. / B.Tech?

More than 81% students got placed in the campus placements. Some of the top recruiters at JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology are Talentio Technologies, Jaro Education, Wiley, and Byju's.

Trainings such as: Soft Skills Training Aptitude Training Computer Programming Training Project Management Training Personality Development Core Domain Training The institute invites recruiting companies to their campus for recruitment. The top recruiters of PVPIT Pune are Talentio Technologies, Jaro Education, Wiley, Byju's, Intellipaat, Wisteria Real Vision, Silicus Technologies, etc.

Candidates can scroll down to this page to view the PVPIT Pune JEE Main cutoff 2025 for various specialisations and categories. A few more updates are below:

The Joint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA) will start the registration for JEE Main Counselling 2024 on June 10. A total of 6 rounds of JEE Main 2024 counselling will be conducted.

PVPIT Pune cutoff 2025 was released via MHT CET entrance exam for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course. For the General AI category students, the last round cutoff range was between 162100 and 351711 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. Considering the lowest cutoff rank of 162100, B.E. in Computer Engineering turned out to be the most competitive branch for admission. In the first round, the cutoff rank for the same branch was 151384.
Considering the JEE Main last round cutoff 2025 for the General AI category students, the top most competitive course for admission was B.E. / B.Tech, with a cutoff rank closing at 162100.

To make an informed decision students must compare different colleges accepting JEE Main for admission. The given below comparison data is based on the JEE Main last round cutoff data. The cutoff is for the General AI category.

MHT CET is the entrance exam for candidates seeking admission to the BE/BTech and other courses. The cutoff was released across different categories under the Home State quota. For the General category, the PVPIT Pune B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 57.82 and 89.49, with the most sought-after branch for admission being Computer Science, which had the highest cutoff percentile of 89.49. Similarly, with a lowest last-round cutoff percentile of 57.82, Civil became the least competitive bra

PVPIT Pune MHT CET cutoff 2025 was released as percentiles, which means the higher the cutoff percentile, the more competitive the course is for admission and vice versa. Considering the last round cutoff data of 2025, Computer Science turned out to be the most competitive for admission, with a cutoff closing at 89.49. For the same competitive branch, the last round cutoff was 88.5 in the General category under the HS quota.

hostel_campus.college_name: PVPIT Pune Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Strong academics and placements with great campus life.
reviews.review_text: Tools, academic & departmental facilities. Our Computer Science & Engineering department is well-equipped with modern infrastructure. Wi-Fi-enabled campus. High-speed internet is available throughout the academic blocks and hostels. A 24/7 medical center is available on campus, staffed with a qualified doctor and basic emergency services. The college also has tie-ups with nearby hospitals for specialized treatment and emergencies.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for my programme is excellent, with well-equipped labs featuring modern technology and a spacious library with a vast collection of relevant texts. There are dedicated study areas with reliable Wi-Fi access. The hostel itself is clean and well-maintained, offering comfortable single-occupancy rooms

reviews.review_heading: Review for the BCA course.
reviews.review_text: The college has well-maintained infrastructure for the BCA course. The labs have Wi-Fi and computer systems with the required software for students to practice. The library, sports, and various other facilities are also offered to students. Overall, the facilities available for our course are good enough.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is excellent, and placements are good. Dissatisfied with campus and college life.
reviews.review_text: There are good facilities for courses and hostels, some rules are quite strict. Labs are well-equipped, and Wi-Fi is available with a reliable network. The library is well-maintained and useful. Sports events are conducted by our university (SPPU). Overall, courses and hostel are good.

reviews.review_heading: The faculty is really good. The only downside is the infrastructure of this college.
reviews.review_text: In this field I don't know what to say. The campus is too small with not much classroom space. The hostel is absolute garbage. There isn't water for 3-4 days and no clean food is served. So I would say it's not good in this case. Many people have considered taking PGs instead of staying in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: You can consider this college, if you have the cutoff marks.
reviews.review_text: Mess is good at the campus. The medical facility is also good. The library and classrooms are clean as well. Wi-Fi speed is also satisfying. Labs are good. All the instruments needed are available at the labs in the college, and all the practicals are conducted.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the faculty and management of the college.
reviews.review_text: The college has good facilities and infrastructure for our course including Wi-Fi, labs, canteen, library, classrooms, etc. for the students. All the offered facilities were of good quality at this college. The rooms of the college hostel were furnished. The food in the college canteen was good to eat.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good placements.
reviews.review_text: Excellent, Wi-Fi rooms, good classrooms and nice hostel rooms are there with Wi-Fi. There is a good library for studies. All the types of books are present. There is a playground for sports competitions.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is good and teachers are very good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available but labs are present. Classrooms and library are available. Good quality of food is there. Water and electricity facility is available 24/7. Hostel is very expensive but restrictions are less. Playground of the college is very small.

reviews.review_heading: This institute is very good and has excellent placement reviews.
reviews.review_text: In our college, a hostel and canteen were available. All facilities were provided on campus. The laboratory and the quality of food served were good. The college provided good facilities for medical, sports, and games.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a decent college to complete your graduation; experienced faculty .
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs are available. The classroom is good. Library facility is great. The food available is of average quality. A playground for various sports is available. Emergency medical facilities with good stay in the hostel is also available. Routine checkups takes place.

reviews.review_heading: All faculty members in our college are good enough to make students' future bright.
reviews.review_text: A huge library is present in our college with Wi-Fi facilities. An important point is that the library is opened 24 hours a day during examination. In the hostel, a geyser, water purifier, water cooler, and washing machine are also present. A Wi-Fi facility is also available per floor in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. The environment is good. There is no noise problem and no pollution, so it is good for studies. The new hostel is built near to the college. There are many facilities like canteen, medical and free Wi-Fi.

reviews.review_heading: Review of JSPM - TSSM's Padmabhooshan Vasantdada Patil Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. You will feel close to nature, but other facilities are not good like faculty, classrooms and library. The hostel is approximately 8-9 km away from college. The college charges the fee of 30,000-35,000 per year, separately for hostel and bus.

reviews.review_heading: I will suggest avoid this college, it's not good for your future and career.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good, but you can't study in library at daytime in exam duration library is open for students to study at night. College provides Wi-Fi facility but few Wi-Fi are not accessible to students. Hostel was in construction in 2019.

review_summary.college_name: Gandhinagar University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: College has good placements, supportive faculty members, and modern facilities.

content.Placements: 70 to 80 percent students from our batch got placed. The highest package offered is around 12 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA and the average package is 5 LPA to 6 LPA. Top recruiting companies included TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Byju's and Tech Mahindra. 60 percent students also got internships in reputed companies like Reliance, Adani and local IT startups. The major roles offered are software developer, data analyst, business development associate and network engineer. Placements are good with decent opportunities for both core and IT fields.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is well maintained with facilities like Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, smart classrooms and well stocked library. Hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, proper medical facilities, and 24X7 water and electricity supply. The food served in the mess is hygienic and has both vegetarian and non vegetarian options. Sports facilities like cricket ground, volleyball court and indoor games are available for students. Campus environment is friendly and supports both academics and extracurricular activities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is amazing. Environment friendly, scalable for students, and much more.

content.Placements: About 80-85% of students are getting placed every year. The highest package is 14 LPA, while the lowest package is 5 LPA. The average package is 9.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Micron, TCS, Infosys, etc. Almost 90% of students got internships. They are placed in Infosys. Top roles are interns and managers.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure and facilities are top-class. All the amenities are in use and are working appropriately. The quality of facilities in our hostel is at next level. They are providing delicious food. Medical facilities are also available. All types of games are been played on the campus.

Apart from the UG and PG courses, the university also offers PhD courses. To get admission to Gandhi University, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. The university offers more than 20 courses in various streams such as Accounting & Commerce, Engineering, Science, etc. The application process atGandhi Universityis conducted online. STEP 1: Gandhi University Application Process 2025
Candidates are required to apply online at the university's official website. The application process for PhD course is INR 1,000.

hostel_campus.college_name: Gandhinagar University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: College has good placements, supportive faculty members, and modern facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is well maintained with facilities like Wi-Fi, modern computer labs, smart classrooms and well stocked library. Hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, proper medical facilities, and 24X7 water and electricity supply. The food served in the mess is hygienic and has both vegetarian and non vegetarian options. Sports facilities like cricket ground, volleyball court and indoor games are available for students. Campus environment is friendly and suppor...

reviews.review_heading: College is amazing. Environment friendly, scalable for students, and much more.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure and facilities are top-class. All the amenities are in use and are working appropriately. The quality of facilities in our hostel is at next level. They are providing delicious food. Medical facilities are also available. All types of games are been played on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: The college has very good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are excellent, except for the Wi-Fi, as it's just terrible. Classrooms are well-equipped, with good studying space. The library is also very good. Hostel rooms are quite smaller than expected. Besides this, everything is fine. This is a ragging-free campus, and Gujaratis are always friendly by nature.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Labs, classrooms, and the library are very well-designed. The canteen is awesome with AC in it. Sports activities are also good. There is a big ground in the backyard of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Very good and nice college for engineering according to me.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Labs, classrooms, and library are very well designed and give you very good vibe. Canteen is awesome with AC in it. Sports activities are also good. There is a big ground in backyard of college.

reviews.review_heading: My college, my opinion, my verdict.
reviews.review_text: Our campus has decent infrastructure. It is surrounded by lush green fields. There are AC rooms all over the campus, and even our canteen has AC. All the rooms are well furnished. Our college sometimes faces electricity outages due to its rural location, but it has a generator that restores electricity within 5 to 10 minutes. Our college is currently building its hostel, which is under development. The area also has PG accommodations at fair rates. Our canteen offers decent food, but the prices ...

reviews.review_heading: Very good and nice College for engineering according to myself.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Labs, classrooms, library are very vell designed and gives you very good wine. Faculty members are very polite and vell behaving towards students and knowledgeable also. Canteen is awesome with AC in it. Sports activities is also good. There is a big ground in backyard of college.

reviews.review_heading: Good College for engineering, according to me, good infrastructure, campus, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good. Labs, classrooms, and library are very well designed and give you a very good vibe. Canteen is awesome with AC in it. Sports activities are also good. There is a big ground in backyard of college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our Gandhinagar University.
reviews.review_text: Our Gandhinagar University is located in a village. But, its environment is very nice because there is no pollution in the college area. The infrastructure of our college is very nice and beautiful. There is one classroom for every 6 ACs. There are many smart boards as well.

reviews.review_heading: If you have average marks in 12th and don't have much money, then you should consider this college.
reviews.review_text: Gandhinagar University College's infrastructure is old but good. The college is in a village, but it feels nice to be in the college. In many areas, the internet doesn't support it. This college has less fees, which is why this college is better than other colleges. The college doesn't have a hostel.

reviews.review_heading: The college is amazing and must visit.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our course is very good and easy. Wi-Fi and labs are amazing and advanced, so we can learn and practice more subjects and gain skills. In our hostel, the staff provides everything you want in it.

reviews.review_heading: At Gandhinagar University, the placement percentage in 2024 was 85%.
reviews.review_text: At this college, Wi-Fi is available. We have lab facilities. There are air-conditioned classrooms. The canteen food is tasty and good. The canteen facilities are good and clean. Sports are there like cricket, football, table tennis, etc. We can play every sport in the playground.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely good faculty members, decent placements in previous years.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled, and everyone can access it free of cost. The classroom infrastructure is also very good. The library is very well-accompanied by lots of books and journals. The hostel facilities for students are also very good. The quality of food is hygienic, the canteen is well-maintained, and the medical and sports facilities are also impressive.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and transportation facilities are very affordable and also safe for both students and faculty members. They provide a great place to live, with good food, a hygienic area and a lot more space included in college. Also, they provide facilities for transportation.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good faculties, decent placements, green and clean campus with quality teaching
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite decent. Wi-Fi facility is quite disgusting sometimes but it is manegable. Moreover, the classes and labs are decent. The tried up hostel is food with okay food quality. The mess in college campus is quite good with good taste and quality. Medical facilities of college is good with decent sports activities.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Calcutta Institute of Technology offers diploma, UG, and PG courses to students. These courses are provided across the Engineering, Computer Application, and various other streams. At the UG level, the college offers four-year BTech course in 10 specialisations, namely Mechanical Engineering, Chemical Engineering, Civil Engineering, and others. At the PG level, the college offers MTech and MCA courses to students. The college also provides three-year diploma courses to students, such as Diploma in Electrical Engineering, Diploma in Mechanical Engineering, and others. Below mentioned are some of the Calcutta Institute of Technology courses and their respective eligibility and :

faqs.answer: A:    The fee bracket for programs offerred by the CIT - Calcutta Institute Of Technology is approximately INR 54000 - INR 338500.
faqs.question: What is the fee range for the courses offered at CIT - Calcutta Institute Of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Aspirants must complete Class 10 with at least 35% aggregate with Mathematics, Physical Science and English as mandatory subjects to apply for Diploma courses at  Calcutta Institute of Technology. The institute offers a three-year Diploma programmes in Electrical, Mechanical, Civil and Electronics & Communication Engineering.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility for Diploma at Calcutta Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    The total fee for Calcutta Institute of Technology M.Tech is INR 2.08 lakh. The total fee of M.Tech includes various components such as admission fee, library fee, caution deposit, tuition fee, etc. Aspirants need to pay a caution deposit of INR 5,000 only once at the time of admission. Aspirants need to pay the admission fee for seat confirmation after completion of the selection process.
faqs.question: What is the fee for M.Tech at Calcutta Institute of Technology?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, aspirants must pass WBUT PGET for admission to M.Tech course at Calcutta Institute of Technology. West Bengal University of Technology Post Graduate Entrance Examination is a computer-based test conducted once in a year by MAKAUT. Aspirants are offered seat in M.Tech based on their WBUT PGET rank.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: If your mind goes into this college then you can join it.

review_content.Placements: If you are going to build a future in an engineering background then you need a degree to become a certified engineer. Calcutta Institute of Technology is one of them. It will be a good choice for you. Around 65-70% of students get placed every year in this course. The highest salary package offered ranges from 8 LPA to 10 LPA. The lowest salary package varies between 2 LPA to 3 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra, Infosys, and many startups. Only a few students were selected for internships. Top roles offered are system engineer, data analyst, SQL developer, data engineer, etc.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is a very good college with all the necessary facilities.

review_content.Placements: More than 65% of students get placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, the average salary package is 3.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 2 LPA. There are more than 20 recruiting companies such as Cognizant, TCS, Capgemini, Hero Honda, and many more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is provided in our college with average speed. Classrooms are neat and clean. Library consists of more than 1 lakh books that help students. Labs are very good with all the safety measures.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are highly skilled in their specialisations. They are very friendly and solve doubts several times. Semester exams are hard but it depends on students' preparation.

review_summary.college_name: Calcutta Institute of Technology Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Calcutta Institute of Technology is a very good college for engineering.

content.Placements: Hi, my name is Ghulam Ale Hasan. I took admission at this college in 2024, and my course will be completed in 2027. I am taking admission here in Electronics and Communication. Last year, almost 90% of students in my department got good placements. The minimum, maximum, and average package in my course is 4–8 LPA. Almost all students in my course get internships. The top roles offered in my course are Senior Engineer or Supervisor.
content.Infrastructure: This college has very good facilities and infrastructure in its classrooms. Classrooms and labs are air-conditioned. There is a huge library here too. The quality of food in the canteen is very good. Medical facilities are also provided in this college. Sports and games are also played after the semester exams.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the college facilities.

content.Placements: The highest package offered in CSE is 5 LPA, and none of the students get internships from the college side. Students gain the skills on their own and get internships from outside the college. From the 6th semester, there are special aptitude and GD training sessions.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is so poor. In the labs, not a single PC is working in good condition, and my classroom is like a carpenter shop; at least the blackboard is not in its place. Now, about the hostel, there are good facilities but not all. I will not get a single wardrobe for my clothes, and at the time of rain, there is water in my room on the first floor.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: If your mind goes into this college then you can join it.

content.Placements: If you are going to build a future in an engineering background then you need a degree to become a certified engineer. Calcutta Institute of Technology is one of them. It will be a good choice for you. Around 65-70% of students get placed every year in this course. The highest salary package offered ranges from 8 LPA to 10 LPA. The lowest salary package varies between 2 LPA to 3 LPA. The average salary package offered ranges between 3 LPA to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Tech Mahindra, Infosys, and many startups. Only a few students were selected for internships. Top roles offered are system engineer, data analyst, SQL developer, data engineer, etc.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is a very good college with all the necessary facilities.

content.Placements: More than 65% of students get placed in our college. The highest salary package offered is 8 LPA, the average salary package is 3.5 LPA, and the lowest salary package is 2 LPA. There are more than 20 recruiting companies such as Cognizant, TCS, Capgemini, Hero Honda, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is provided in our college with average speed. Classrooms are neat and clean. Library consists of more than 1 lakh books that help students. Labs are very good with all the safety measures.
content.Faculty: Faculty members in our college are highly skilled in their specialisations. They are very friendly and solve doubts several times. Semester exams are hard but it depends on students' preparation.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Computer Applications (MCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the behavior of the faculty and some good placements in previous years.

content.Placements: It's the best college for MCA. If you looking for growth as a technical expertise then you should choose the best college. This campus was not good but our teachers were very good. They also helped us to get some jobs offered. Our college offered 3-5 companies but all were below average.
content.Infrastructure: Our college had very good facilities and infrastructure but our college could charge for the Wi-Fi. There were good lab and library facilities. But all the library books were of the old version. There were no good facilities for the hostel and this was the most problematic for us. A canteen, sports, and games were available.

admission_overview.college_name: Calcutta Institute of Technology Admission 2025: Fees, Eligibility, Application & Selection

admission_process.title: Calcutta Institute of Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Calcutta Institute of Technology admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The institute considers scores in national or state-level entrance exams such as WBJEE, JEE Main, PGET, etc. for admission to specific courses.Calcutta Institute of Technologyoffers courses at UG, PG and diploma levels in the Engineering and Computer Applications streams. The university offers courses in affiliation withMAKAUT. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

CIT offers admission to courses based on the candidates' entrance exam scores. Those applying for admission need to fulfil the eligibility criteria of the preferred programme. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 and graduation is required for PG programmes. Below areCIT Kolkata coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Download:CIT Kolkata Brochure 2025

Admissions are currently open for all courses at CIT Kolkata. The institute considers the entrance exam scores of the aspirants for admission. Aspirants must fulfil both the eligibility and selection requirements for admission. Below are the steps to get a seat in CIT Kolkata:
Step 1: Calcutta Institute of Technology Application Process 2025

Candidates can apply online for the preferred course. Aspirants are first required to verify their mobile number to fill out the application form. Candidates also need to pay an application fee to apply for admission.
Step 2: Selection

Calcutta Institute of Technology shortlists candidates for admission based on their score in the national or state-level entrance exam. The institute considers JEE Main/ WBJEE scores for BTech and WBUT PGET for MTech. Besides, aspirants can get admission in MCA and diploma programmes based on their WBJEE JECA and JEXPO scores, respectively.
Step 3: Counselling & Seat Allotment

Candidates seeking admission in the MCA programme also need to participate in the centralised counselling process of MAKAUT. For all other courses, aspirants need to participate in the accepted state-level entrance exam counselling. Further, candidates need to report at the campus for document verification and fee payment. Aspirants need to pay theCIT Kolkata feeto confirm their seat.

courses_data.description: Calcutta Institute of Technology offers a four-year BTech programme divided into eight semesters. The institute offers BTech in various specialisations such as Mechanical,Chemical,Computer Science, Electrical,Civil, Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning, etc. Candidates who have completed Class 12 in relevant subjects are eligible to apply for the BTech programme. Admission to the course is based on WBJEE or JEE Main scores of the aspirants. Besides, the institute also offers lateral entry to BTech courses.

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at Calcutta Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Calcutta Institute of Technology offers BTech for four-years at the UG level. The course is spread across eight semesters. Candidates who have passed the HSc examination in relevant subjects can apply for BTech. Below are some of the BTech specialisations offered by CIT Kolkata:Mechanical EngineeringChemical EngineeringComputer ScienceElectronics & CommunicationData ScienceArtificial intelligence and Machine Learning, etc.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for BTech at Calcutta Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed HSc examination with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate are eligible to apply for the BTech course at Calcutta Institute of Technology. Besides, aspirants must also hold a valid score in JEE Main or WBJEE for admission. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

The total fee for BTech (LE) ranges betweenINR 2.49 lakhandINR 3.03 lakh.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for M.Tech at Calcutta Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Candidates who have passed a bachelor's degree in Engineering/ Technology are eligible to apply for Calcutta Institute of Technology M.Tech course. Aspirants must have relevant documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, candidates should also have a valid score in WBUT PGET for admission to M.Tech programme.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam required for M.Tech at Calcutta Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Yes, aspirants must pass WBUT PGET for admission to M.Tech course at Calcutta Institute of Technology. West Bengal University of Technology Post Graduate Entrance Examination is a computer-based test conducted once in a year by MAKAUT. Aspirants are offered seat in M.Tech based on their WBUT PGET rank.

faqs.question: What is the minimum qualification required to apply at Calcutta Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Candidates must fulfil the educational requirements specified by the institute. Candidates are required to pass a minimum of Class 12 for UG courses and graduation for PG programmes. Below is course-wise eligibility for CIT Kolkata:CourseCommon EligibilityBTechHSc with Physics,  Chemistry and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregateMTechBachelor's degree in Engineering/ TechnologyMCABachelor's degree in Engineering/ Technology with Mathematics in Class 12DiplomaClass 10 with at least 35% aggregate with Mathematics, Physical Science and English as mandatory subjects

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Calcutta Institute of Technology?
faqs.answer: Calcutta Institute of Technology admissions are entrance-based. The institute considers scores in national or state-level entrance exams for admission. CIT Kolkata accepts JEE Main or WBJEE scores for BTech, PGET for M.Tech and JECA for MCA programmes. Besides, aspirants applying for Diploma course need to appear for JEXPO. Aspirants are alloted seat in the institute based on their entrance exam scores. Selected candidates need to report at the campus for document verification and fee payment.

faqs.question: Does Calcutta Institute of Technology accept JEE Main score?
faqs.answer: Yes, Calcutta Institute of Technology accepts JEE Main scores for admission to the BTech programme. Aspirants without JEE Main score can also apply for admission to BTech programme with WBJEE score. In 2024, the highest JEE Main cutoff was 299438 for BTech Chemical Engineering for General All India category.

faqs.question: Can I join Calcutta Institute of Technology without WBJEE?
faqs.answer: The answer to this question depends on the course applied by the candidate. Those applying for BTech programme at Calcutta Institute of Technology need to have a valid score in WBJEE. Aspirants without WBJEE score can apply with their JEE Main score for BTech course. For all other courses, the institute accepts different entrance test. Hence, aspirants applying for any other course except BTech can get admission without WBJEE score provided they pass accepted entrance tests for the applied course.

reviews.review_heading: Calcutta Institute of Technology is a very good college for engineering.
reviews.review_text: This college has very good facilities and infrastructure in its classrooms. Classrooms and labs are air-conditioned. There is a huge library here too. The quality of food in the canteen is very good. Medical facilities are also provided in this college. Sports and games are also played after the semester exams.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the college facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is so poor. In the labs, not a single PC is working in good condition, and my classroom is like a carpenter shop; at least the blackboard is not in its place. Now, about the hostel, there are good facilities but not all. I will not get a single wardrobe for my clothes, and at the time of rain, there is water in my room on the first floor.

reviews.review_heading: If your mind goes into this college then you can join it.
reviews.review_text: In this computer science and engineering course, you will see a lot of subjects and syllabi. A lot of subjects like database management system, encryption technology, operating system, and many more are available. Our college will provide you with good classrooms. The campus provides computer lab facilities, Wi-Fi service, and a central library. The hostel is good but it is not the best for you. If you don't choose, then you can stay in the mess. Our college has a canteen and medical facilities ...

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with all the necessary facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is provided in our college with average speed. Classrooms are neat and clean. Library consists of more than 1 lakh books that help students. Labs are very good with all the safety measures.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the behavior of the faculty and some good placements in previous years.
reviews.review_text: Our college had very good facilities and infrastructure but our college could charge for the Wi-Fi. There were good lab and library facilities. But all the library books were of the old version. There were no good facilities for the hostel and this was the most problematic for us. A canteen, sports, and games were available.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Calcutta Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college and hostel is good. College and hostel has all the basic facilities. College has a library with an ample number of books which gives you books for the whole semester and after that, you have to return it and take new books for the next semester. It has a big grounds for playing different sports.

reviews.review_heading:
The college is very big and mainly the infrastructure like lab, library is good
.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, and the lab is very big. All the classrooms are under CCTV, and a big library is available. The hostels are good but the distance between the hostel and college is around 5 kms. For this, bus facilities are available for hostel students. A canteen is available on the hostel campus. The college has also two medical Colleges attached so medical facilities are very helpful. And two sports ground are available for playing. Besides carrom, table tennis facilities are also availabl...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Calcutta Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The classrooms and labs are well organised and maintained. Good transportation facilities are available for emergency purposes. From the college library, we can get various course-related books and previous year question papers. But the condition of the canteen is not much good, and it needs immediate improvement.

reviews.review_heading: Review of CIT - Calcutta Institute Of Technology.
reviews.review_text: I don't stay in the hostel, so I don't know about it. The course system is very poor because the college doesn't know how to teach students. I think money is all about necessary things in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Somewhat satisfied with the college because of our course faculty and good placements for our course
reviews.review_text:
1. CIT has proper facilities of laboratories. But most of the computers in labs were not working. Library is there. Classrooms are good but fans are not working. Washrooms were bad. No proper water system waa there. 
2. I have not stayed in hostel but from my friends I have heard bad reviews about the hostel. Quality of canteen food was poor. It was very unhygienic. There were no medical facilities Inside the college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Calcutta Institute Of Technology.
reviews.review_text: Hostel facility in college is very nice and well cleaned but located in a remote area. There is also a hostel facility for girls, which is about 3 km away from the college. Classrooms are clean and spacious. The campus life of the college is very nice. There is a library for study purpose. There are a canteen and open ground.

reviews.review_heading: Review of CIT - Calcutta Institute Of Technology
reviews.review_text: The college was established in 2004, and it has a huge infrastructure. All the modern facilities are available in the campus. There are two lifts, well-designed labs and also a huge workshop for the mechanical engineering students. Classrooms are large and well ventilated. All types of sports are organized by the students every year in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Calcutta Institute Of Technology.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is above average. All the lab facilities are available. Even advanced lab facility is available here. A well-equipped workshop is provided for the students. There is also a digital library. Wi-Fi facility is also available here.

reviews.review_heading: The college provides good facilities and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is good. There are sufficient machines in labs. The playground is not good. There is a need for a good playground. The canteen is good. Wi-Fi facility is good. Hostels are also available and offered at low prices. Even there are hostel facilities for girls. All the floors clean.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good. There are very helpful teachers.
reviews.review_text: The library of our college is very good. Others amenities are good. The Wi-Fi facility of the college is excellent. Classrooms are very good. Sports are very nice. Almost 5-6 sports are available in our college. The medical facility is good here. College is very colourful. Every room is clean and beautiful. Even the workshop and every lab room is excellent.

Admission to various courses is based on merit and entrance exam scores. At the UG level, the university offers BTech, BBA, BVoc, and other courses to students. The duration of all UG courses ranges from three to four years. At the PG level, the university offers MBA, MTech, MVoc, and various other courses to students. reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: It is an excellent college with good and experienced faculty members.

review_content.Placements: Placement support is decent. The placement cell brings companies with a reasonable profit range, and strong performers take good offers. The average package offered is aligned with industry standards. The top packages offered depend highly on our preparation. Workshops and mock interviews are the best.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with greenery. The size of the campus is very large. Hostels are also available that are separate for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi connectivity is also available, but it is only in the academic block and is weaker in hostels. The overall ecosystem promotes focused learning.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: The perfect hub of technology .

review_content.Placements: I'm pursuing B.Tech, and the academics are so good that most of the students get placement from campus. There are around 80 percent of students who get placement from the campus. The highest package is 50 LPA in my course. The top recruiting companies of my course are Google, Wipro, Accenture, Yahoo, Zomato, Swiggy, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is overall good for Students. Our department has well-equipped labs, working project tools, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi access, and a decent library with enough books for reference. The hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, drinking water, and proper security.

review_summary.college_name: Shri Vishwakarma Skill University Gurugram Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The best college for a technical course.

content.Placements: In my course, mostly 70% of students get placement. The highest package offered is 21 LPA, and the average package is 5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are Zomato, Microsoft, Wipro, and LinkedIn. Top roles offered by the companies are telecalling, web development, data analysis, and purchase assistance.
content.Infrastructure: College infrastructure is so good, there are clean classes, well-hygiene washrooms, and an RO water service facility. There is Wi-Fi available in all classes, and the seminar halls are wide and have enough space for 200 students to be seated at once. Also, there are clean corridors.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good in infrastructure, syllabus, and they conduct excellent training every semester.

content.Placements: Well, it's better not to hope for even a single percent from this college, as barely anyone gets selected on campus because barely any companies come, and even if they do, they pay too little. There is no such top recruiting company. If I named them, everybody would say they have heard about this company for the first time, and it’s too hard to find them on Google, too. The top role offered in my course is web development.
content.Infrastructure: Well, I will say that in terms of infrastructure, this is the best. It's so goated that multiple movies, web series, and ads are being shot here. Classrooms are well-equipped with centralized AC, smart boards, speakers, and Wi-Fi. The library is also well-spaced and has a lot of books and quite a space to study. The hostel is also the best according to infrastructure, and the mess food, I would say, is okayish. Hostels have good Wi-Fi and hot and cold showers, and a sports ground.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It is an excellent college with good and experienced faculty members.

content.Placements: Placement support is decent. The placement cell brings companies with a reasonable profit range, and strong performers take good offers. The average package offered is aligned with industry standards. The top packages offered depend highly on our preparation. Workshops and mock interviews are the best.
content.Infrastructure: The college has good infrastructure with greenery. The size of the campus is very large. Hostels are also available that are separate for both boys and girls. Wi-Fi connectivity is also available, but it is only in the academic block and is weaker in hostels. The overall ecosystem promotes focused learning.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) (Lateral Entry) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The perfect hub of technology .

content.Placements: I'm pursuing B.Tech, and the academics are so good that most of the students get placement from campus. There are around 80 percent of students who get placement from the campus. The highest package is 50 LPA in my course. The top recruiting companies of my course are Google, Wipro, Accenture, Yahoo, Zomato, Swiggy, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is overall good for Students. Our department has well-equipped labs, working project tools, smart classrooms, Wi-Fi access, and a decent library with enough books for reference. The hostel facilities are also satisfactory with clean rooms, drinking water, and proper security.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: One of the best budget-friendly colleges, with job opportunities, and a great environment.

content.Placements: One of the best campuses in Haryana to pursue B.Tech. Healthy environment and good jobs. The placement scenario for the CSE branch here is excellent. In our batch, I would say around 85-90 percent of students who sat for placements got placed. The college's placement cell works tirelessly from the third year itself. The salary packages are very encouraging. The highest package went to a remarkable 50.5 LPA (an exceptional off-campus placement), while the lowest is around 3.5 LPA. The average package for our CSE branch is comfortable between 5.5 LPA and 6 LPA, which is a fantastic start. Top recruiting companies visit our college.

admission_overview.college_name: Shri Vishwakarma Skill University Gurugram Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: Shri Vishwakarma Skill University Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: SVSU admission is open. At SVSU students are offered various programmes at the UG, PG diploma and certificate levels. The university provides courses in the fields ofTechnology,Management,Commerce,etc.SVSUaccepts students primarily on an entrance basis. The admission process is online.

SVSU course admissionis primarily entrance-based. The university also accepts students on a merit basis for a few of its courses. The university offers a variety of specialisations for its programmes. Interested students can refer to the following table to learn more about the eligibility and selection details for theSVSU courses:
Course Name
Eligibility
Selection Criteria

SVSU course feesvary according to the programme and specialisations selected by the students. The fee is inclusive of several components such as admission fee, lab fee, medical insurance and other components. Students can pay the fee either semester-wise or yearly. Find below theSVSU feefor some of its popular courses:
Course Name
Tuition Fee

SVSU seat intakediffers from course to course. Students are offered seats based on their performance in the accepted entrance exams. Participating in the counselling process is mandatory for seat allotment. Check below given table to know aboutSVSU seat intakefor some of its popular programmes:
Course Name

SVSUreserves seats for various categories. To avail of the reservation students must submit the required documents at the time of admission. Aspirants can refer to the following table to learn aboutSVSU seat reservationfor various categories:
10% of Haryana Open Gen. Category

Theadmission procedure of SVSUinvolves multiple steps like application, selection and admission confirmation. The admission criteria for the preferred course is satisfied before applying for it. Check below for the steps to completeSVSU admission process:
SVSU Application Process
To apply for the preferred course at SVSU, visit the official website and fill the application form available. Fill in all the specified information.
Selection Process
Students are shortlisted on the basis of their entrance exam score. The university accepts CUET-UG and CUET-PG scores for UG and PG course admissions.
Admission Confirmation
To confirm their seat at the university, students must pay the admission fee and go through the verification (if required).

faqs.question: Can I take direct admission in BTech at Shri Vishwakarma Skill University?
faqs.answer: No, Shri Vishwakarma Skill University does not accept direct admission for its BTech programme. To be eligible for the course, candidates must pass Class 12 in the Science stream from a recognised board. Additionally, students also need to appear and clear the accepted entrance exam. The university considers score obtained in the JEE Main exam. Students need to participate in the HSTES counselling for theSVSU BTeach seat allotment.

faqs.question: What is the admission process for B.Tech in Shri Vishwakarma Skill University?
faqs.answer: To start the admission process for BTech at Shri Vishwakarma Skill University, you have to visit the official website. Please review the admission terms and conditions.Now, you have to complete the application form online. Pay the application fee of INR 1000 (non-refundable).Wait for the announcement of the merit list and based on that you will be invited for the counseling process.During the process, you can discuss the course preferences with the college.

reviews_list.review_title: Better for studying.

review_content.Placements: Almost 60% of students get placed every year, and it's mostly off-campus. The highest package is nearly 12 LPA. Many students opt for higher studies instead of placements to secure better positions and higher packages. In our branch, ECE, this is common. The average package is around 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies include Aditya Birla, among others. About 90% of students get internships, mostly in NITs and big colleges, especially in ECE.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, but the college doesn't allocate funds easily. We have properly functioning labs, and the classrooms are large and clean. You won’t get a mobile signal inside the building, but Wi-Fi is available everywhere on campus with a constant speed of 30-50 Mbps. Boys don't get a hostel in the 1st and 2nd years, but girls do. The canteen is clean, less hazy, and cheaper than outside shops. Medical facilities are also good, and we are very active in sports.

individual_reviews.title: Faculty is good but placement and classes are below average.

content.Placements: Approximately 19 percent of students got placed from my course. The lowest package is 2.3 LPA, the highest is 7 LPA-8 LPA, but the average is around 3 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, etc. Almost 60 percent of students get into internships (online and offline) at PayPal, Agoda, CSG, Electronic Arts, etc. Top roles are software engineer, backend developer, and graphic designer.
content.Infrastructure: There is free Wi-Fi in the college, all labs are available and running, but some machines need to be prepared. The library is pretty good with a proper librarian and books, classrooms are well-lit, and there are both blackboards and digital screens. ( Non AC). The hostel is only for 3rd and 4th years, with proper water and food. Food quality is decent. Mess and canteen provide read, price, vegetarian, and non-vegetarian food options. Medical facilities are average. The hospital is 3km away from the campus. Sports culture is very good. Football, cricket, badminton, and volleyball are regularly practiced in the grounds.

reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available everywhere. Classrooms are big and clean and the study environment is good. Almost 70 students can easily sit in the room. The library is really very good. All required course books are present. There is a big playground in the college. Mess and canteen food are really very good.

reviews.review_text: Coochbehar Government Engineering College is located in Coochbehar West Bengal, beside Torsha river. We have very fresh weather there. Facilities are available in this college including Wi-Fi, laboratory, smart classrooms, and library. Everything is available. If I talk about the hostel, it is very clean, comfortable, and hygienic. The food in hostel is very tasty and hygienic.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, a very good college to be a part of. All the faculty members are really very helpful.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers modern facilities, including Wi-Fi, labs, smart classrooms, and a vast library. Hostels provide comfortable living with quality food in a mess and canteen, medical facilities and sports infrastructure, including courts and gyms, support student well-being.

reviews.review_heading: A journey of bachelors degree.
reviews.review_text: There are enough facilities for a tier 3 college. Each department has its own labs. The classroom and the library will fulfill your most needed books, and also books under the curriculum. A hostel is not provided for 1st -3rd year boys, but some financially unstable students can get it, though it's not for all. The canteen is there. Food quantity is Average. Other facilities are also there.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and absolutely satisfied.
reviews.review_text: The whole campus has Wi-Fi access, the labs are in good condition, the classrooms are good, and our library has a huge stock of different books. For boys, hostels are available only in the fourth year, and for girls, hostels are available for every year. The quality of food is good. Canteens are also in good condition. Medical facilities are also available on campus. Among different clubs, our sports club is the best, anyone who likes sports is welcome here.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty members and placement cell are too poor but college infrastructure is good.
reviews.review_text: The course labs are very poor, except soil lab otherwise all labs require less apparatus. Hostel facility is very poor and is available only for 4th-year students. Canteen is shut down maximum time.

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure and placement.
reviews.review_text: Facilities such as Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and all are good indeed. The quality of hostel, food available in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are well enough and are well maintained with proper discipline undertaken by the staffs.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with good faculty members, infrastructure, and everything.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. There is a Wi-Fi system with AC, labs, a library, and smart classrooms. The quality of the hostel is good with proper management of good quality food, electricity supply, and medical facilities. There is a sports arena too for everyone. There is a big field where football is being practised. It also has cricket and other sports.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely mesmerized by the beauty of the college area, the faculty, and everything in college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is quite well maintained.  CCTVs are installed, Wi-Fi has proper high internet, and classrooms are well maintained with chairs, tables, benches, and smart boards with projectors. The library is also well maintained, and the hostel is also maintained, the food is also properly cooked and proper health charts are being maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Coochbehar Government Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Hostels are very bad, and we can get a hostel when we are in the 3rd year. The infrastructure is very bad. On rainy days, water comes into the classroom. There is a lift in this college but I did not see to use of it. Maybe, they do not want to risk their life.

reviews.review_heading: The placement cell is active, and the infrastructure and facilities are top-notch.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure at my college are very good, excellent, and outstanding. The courses at my college are top-notch. Wi-Fi connectivity is also good, and the labs are well-equipped. The restrooms are clean and well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good enough. Labs are having AC, prominent benches to study, well well-upgraded study system by using projectors, quality of rooms in hostels, and food is also good. Library is also AC structured so that students can study silently with ease.

college_info.intro:
IILM University Gurgaon offers a wide variety of courses at the Gurgaon campus. The programmes are offered through its four different schools. The students are not only offered quality education but are also offered different national and international skills and knowledge to perform well in the industry. The flagship programme offered at the university is the MBA programme. i.e. offered through the School of Management.
IILM Gurgaon offers 12 different MBA programmes that include one general MBA and 11 MBAs with different specialisation. Opting for specialisation helps students to choose from vast career opportunities. Students can also pursue a PGDM programme, i.e. also offered at the university. Both PGDM and MBA are equivalent programme and offer similar knowledge and experience to the students. Candidates who want to pursue the programme must have a valid score in CAT/ XAT/ MAT/ CMAT/ GMAT/ NMAT/ ATMA/ CUET-PG.
IILM Gurgaon offers an MBA programme in Data Science in collaboration with IBM. Students can also choose different specialisations such as Entrepreneurship, Financial Technology, Human Resource Management, Marketing and Innovation, Manufacturing Management, Artificial Intelligence, and Management Technology offers further sub-specialisations like AI, Data Science, and Web 3.0. Students can also select a general MBA or PGDM programme. PGDM programme is also offered with a specialisation in Entrepreneurship and Family Business.
For more information about IILM University Gurgaon check out the video below:

placements.overview: IILM Gurgaon is committed towards offering quality education and qualification to the students. It offers a wide range of UG and PG level courses across different streams. In addition to offering degree programmes, the university also offers Global Study programmes. This is a 3-week programme for which students can choose from a wide option of partner universities in different countries.

faqs.answer: A:    AIMA MAT releases the results phase wise. The exam is held in multiple sessions in February, May, September and December phases. So the results are released for all the sessions of a particular phase on the same day. The MAT February result of all sessions are released in March. The MAT May results are released in June and the MAT September result is released in October and MAT December results are released in January. Candidates who appear for the exam, can download their scorecard for their exam session from the AIMA MAT website. AIMA does not release cut offs for admission through MAT. It has no role in the MAT cut off determination. The participating institutes determine MAT cut offs on their own and as per their selection parameters and criteria.

review_summary.college_name: IILM University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (AI & ML) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: The college is good and value for money.

content.Placements: Students in IILM are groomed well, as their placement criteria is also good. The minimum package is 2.5 LPA and the highest package is 56 LPA. Many top companies visit the college. Internships start from 1st year. B.Tech, BBA, and many courses are available here. It is the best for law students.
content.Infrastructure: College is in the developing stage as more infrastructure buildings are made. It has good classrooms and 2-3 libraries to study. It has 3 cafes. Medical facilities are also good. There is an advantage for girls as girls hostel is on the college campus. Students and campus are also good.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The infrastructure is good. Faculty members are highly educated with prior experience.

content.Placements: The placement rate is 90% in our college. IILM invites companies like Deloitte, Google, etc. Top companies are on campus. The top roles offered in the course are Financial Planning, HR Recruiter, Marketing Manager, and Business Analyst. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest is 2 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is awesome, and the campus focuses on greenery. The food quality is like that in marriages. The sports played are basketball and cricket in the ground itself. The campus has 3 libraries, huge classrooms with AC, and full-time Wi-Fi connection. The campus has huge security.

individual_reviews.course: BBA LL.B. (Hons.) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Review of IILM University, Gurgaon.

content.Placements: Placements are decent in the college. Many companies come to the college for hiring. They provide decent packages. The college helps students to find internships in every aspect. The average package is 6 LPA The college is very supportive during placements.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good. Hostels are available for both boys and girls. The campus contains a library, cafe, basketball court, badminton court, volleyball court, etc. The college also consists of computer labs and one lab is full of iMacs only.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Life-changing track having high hope but should have hope would be very low.

content.Placements: They have not shown any interest in giving the placement, as I am in semester 6 and have not been told about what companies are coming, how to prepare for interviews in future life, or about personal assistance for placement. I talked to senior-year students, and they told me that a few companies come for BBA students.
content.Infrastructure: They have many classrooms, but each year many students take admission, and they are not able to manage it. As a result, students have to suffer. In between, we have an extra one to one and a half hour break, and either the classroom is not available or the faculty is busy with some other subject. They provide Wi-Fi, but you can connect with only one device, either a laptop or a phone.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Bad placement percentage, less than 50% students are placed.

content.Placements: The college helps students get jobs in good companies. Some students get high-paying jobs in Deloitte, KPMG, EY, but many get average ones and the average package is 5-6 LPA. The college helps students find jobs, but could do more to connect them with top companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of both campus and hostel is so-so. There is no in-campus hostel for boys, they have partnered up with a firm called Yourspace. The food was really bad, so we had to raise a complaint to change the food vendors. After some time, the new vendors deteriorated their food quality as well, and only veg food is available. No sports ground, only a basketball court that too is under maintenance. Medical practitioners on the campus take care of what medicine should be given to students.

admission_process.title: IILM University Gurgaon Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Candidates are offered admission at IILM based on their merit or entrance exam scores. Aspirants can appear for entrance test conducted by the university for some courses. Check below the steps to get a seat in the university:
1: IILM University Gurgaon Application Process 2026

Aspirants can apply online or offline, as they prefer. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply for any of the UG, PG, or PhD programmes. Candidates must complete the application form and upload the specified documents.
2: Selection

IILM Gurugram shortlists candidates for courses such as BTech, MBA, BA LLB, BBA LLB based on entrance exam scores.CUET-UGscore is accepted for admission to BA LLB, BBA LLB, and some other UG courses. The university also accepts CUET-PG for MBA, LLM, MA, etc. IILM conducts an admission test for BTech, LLM and other courses. The university also conducts a personal interview round for admission. Aspirants getting admission based on merit have to directly come for the personal interview round.
3: Admission Confirmation
Once the selection rounds are over, selected aspirants receive the admission offer letter. Such aspirants need to pay theIILM University Gurgaon feesto confirm their admission.
For more information about IILM Gurugram check out the below video:

faqs.answer: IILM University Gurgaon accepts national-level entrance exams such as CLAT, CUET-UG, CUET-PG, etc. for admission to specific programmes. faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in IILM University Gurugram?
faqs.answer: Aspirants must first check the eligibility requirements to apply for a course. Once registration is done, aspirants must also fulfil the selection criteria. For courses such as BTech, MBA, BA LLB (Hons) and BBA LLB (Hons), entrance exam is required for admission. CLAT is accepted for BA LLB (Hons) and BBA LLB (Hons) programmes. CUET-PG and other Management entrance exam is accepted for MBA admission.

faqs.question: Does IILM University Gurgaon require CUET?
faqs.answer: Yes, IILM University Gurgaon accepts CUET score for admission to some of the UG courses.Common University Entrance Testalso known asCUET UGis a national level entrance exam conducted by NTA. he exam is conducted once a year in over 500 cities in India and abroad. The exam is conducted in a computer-based mode. CUET exam is conducted in multiple phases depending upon on the number of candidates registered for the entrance exam. Below are the courses accepting CUET-UG score:BA LLB (Hons)BBA LLB (Hons)BBA (Hons)BDesBA (Hons), etc.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in IILM Gurugram?
faqs.answer: IILM University Gurugram offers admission to courses either based on merit or entrance exam score. IILM Gurugram selects candidates for courses such as BTech, MBA, BA LLB, BBA LLB based on entrance exam scores.CUET-UGscore is accepted for admission to BA LLB, BBA LLB, and some other UG courses. The university also accepts CUET-PG scores for MBA, LLM and MA.For other courses, merit in the last qualifying exam is considered for admission. The university may also conduct personal interview round for admission to a few programmes.
